title: eCommerce Product Data Operator
description:
Hi there,



We are an Australian-based industrial 3D printing supplier looking for a Product Data Operator to manage and maintain a structured Shopify catalogue.



This is a data accuracy and operations role, not a marketing, design, or content role.



You will work with supplier feeds, product data, and Shopify exports to ensure our catalogue is clean, accurate, and scalable.



Rate & Hours



Rate: $4–$6 USD/hour (based on experience and accuracy)

Hours: 10–20 hours per week (trial, with potential to increase)



This role begins with a paid test task and short trial period.



Core Responsibilities

Map supplier SKUs to Shopify products and variants (exact match only)

Maintain and populate structured product metafields based on defined rules (no guessing or free text)

Validate product, inventory, and supplier data

Prepare and clean CSV files for Shopify (Matrixify preferred)

Identify and flag duplicates, mismatches, or missing products

Execute tasks from defined queues (no independent decision-making)

Rules (Non-Negotiable)



You must follow these rules at all times:



Do NOT guess SKU matches

Do NOT rewrite product names or titles

Do NOT create new products without approval

Do NOT modify pricing or product structure

Do NOT enter free-text values into structured metafields

Flag any uncertainty clearly



Accuracy is more important than speed.



Requirements

Experience working with structured product attributes or metafields (Shopify or similar)

Experience managing large product catalogues (1000+ SKUs preferred)

Strong understanding of SKUs, variants, and structured product data

Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills

High attention to detail and consistency

Ability to follow strict processes without deviation

Preferred (Nice to Have)

Shopify experience (products, variants, CSV imports)

Matrixify (Excelify) experience

Experience working with supplier product feeds

Inventory / operations background

Test Task (Required)



Shortlisted candidates will complete a paid test task:



Map 20 SKUs from supplier data to Shopify

Identify exact matches only

Flag uncertain or missing items

Populate required metafields using provided rules

How to Apply



Please include:



A short explanation of how you handle SKU matching

Your experience with product or inventory data

Confirmation that you understand and will follow the rules above

Final Note



We are not looking for a general VA or SEO specialist.

We are looking for a reliable operator who can execute structured data work accurately and consistently.

title: Experienced Technical VA
description:
**** DON'T JUST APPLY. READ EVERYTHING AND MAKE SURE YOU'RE A FIT.



Role Type

Expert Technical VA — Senior Level



Title

AI & Automation Systems Specialist

Seniority: Senior (with fast-track to Lead Tech / Head of Automation)



Mission of the Role

To architect, implement, and maintain world-class AI systems — including Voice AI, SDR automation, lead follow-up systems, CRM workflows, data syncing, and multichannel outreach — that significantly improve client communication, efficiency, and revenue.



BEFORE YOU GO ANY FURTHER. UNLESS YOU MEET THE REQUIREMENTS - DON'T APPLY.



Technical Communication:

- Advanced English writing and speaking - we can't let language barrier to be an issue.

- Able to translate technical info for non-technical terms.



This Role Is NOT a Fit If Any of These Apply:

- Poor communication: You are slow to respond, unclear in updates, fail to confirm receipt, or leave people guessing about status or next steps.

- Unreliable with time: You show up late, miss meetings or deadlines, or treat timelines and working hours as flexible.

- Inconsistent availability: You cannot maintain a stable schedule, disappear without notice, or frequently change availability.

- Lack of ownership: You need to be chased to complete work, shift responsibility, or see work as not a priority

- Excuse-driven execution: You miss deadlines, blame circumstances, or explain why something didn’t happen instead of solving the problem.

- Reactive mindset: You wait to be told what to do, don’t flag issues early, or fail to think ahead about risks and improvements.

- Low attention to detail: You cut corners, skip steps, avoid testing, or submit work without proper review.

- Resistance to structure: You dislike SOPs, avoid documentation, or push back against company policies.

- Defensive to feedback: You take correction personally, resist accountability, or fail to apply feedback quickly.

- Self-focused over team-focused: You prioritize personal convenience over team success, client outcomes, or long-term trust.



ONLY Proceed if ALL of These Apply:



- Clear, proactive communicator: You respond quickly during working hours, confirm receipt, provide concise status updates, and communicate next steps without being asked.

- Highly reliable with time: You show up early or on time, respect meetings and deadlines, and treat commitments as non-negotiable.

- Consistently available and dependable: You maintain a stable schedule, communicate changes in advance, and ensure coverage and continuity.

- Strong ownership mindset: You take full responsibility for outcomes, follow through without reminders, and see work through to completion.

- Solution-oriented executor: When obstacles arise, you propose solutions, adjust plans, and keep progress moving—no excuses.

- Proactive and forward-thinking: You anticipate needs, flag risks early, suggest improvements, and think two steps ahead.

- Detail-oriented and quality-driven: You double-check your work, test before delivery, and take pride in accuracy and polish.

- System-first thinker: You follow SOPs, document processes, improve workflows, and leave clear handoffs so nothing depends on you alone.

- Coachability and maturity: You receive feedback professionally, implement it quickly, and continuously raise your standards.

- Team-first, mission-driven: You care about client outcomes, team success, and long-term trust more than personal convenience.



Key Responsibilities

AI System Architecture & Implementation

- Build advanced AI workflows using N8N, Make, Zapier, GoHighLevel, OpenAI API, and LangChain-style logic.

- Configure AISDRs, voice agents (RetellAi), and multi-step automations that handle inbound, outbound, nurturing, qualification, booking, and follow-up.



You will ensure every client’s system is:

- fast

- reliable

- error-free

- scalable

- and fully documented



Workflow Design & Mapping

Convert messy client processes into clean, automated systems (lead > follow-up > qualification > appointment > CRM sync).



Voice AI & Phone Automation

- Build and deploy AI voice agents using:

- Twilio / SIP integrations

- RetellAi, Whisper, ElevenLabs, or other LLM voice stacks

- Configure pre-call SMS flows, voi
 detection, call intelligence, routing, and appointment booking.



Data Integration & System Syncing

- Connect CRMs (Zoho, GHL, HubSpot, 
) with databases, Google Sheets, APIs, and 3rd-party tools.

- Ensure clean data flow and real-time updates between all systems.

- Apollo Auto Data Enrichment



API Connections & Webhooks

- Build and maintain API-based automations using HTTP requests, custom headers, authentication, and JSON parsing.



Client Fulfillment

- Execute high-quality technical builds from project briefs, client onboarding, or system audits.

- Provide timeline updates, project progress, and clear communication.



Quality Assurance

- Test every workflow end-to-end to ensure accuracy.

- Run failure scenarios, edge cases, and stress tests before launch.



Troubleshooting & Optimization

- Diagnose issues fast, without hand-holding.

- Propose automation upgrades and system optimizations proactively.



Documentation

- Create clean SOPs, diagrams, flowcharts, and configuration documentation for all automations.



Client Communication

- Join calls when needed to gather requirements, demo builds, or explain technical setups.



Continuous Learning

- Stay ahead of emerging AI tools, automation frameworks, and voice technologies.



Essential Qualifications / Skills (Must-Haves)



Automation Expertise = MUST be an EXPERT. Advanced knowledge.



Strong, provable capability with:

- N8N (expert level)

- RetellAI

- Zapier

- Make (Integromat)

- GoHighLevel (GHL)

- OpenAI API

- ChatGPT Assistants, embeddings, prompt workflows

- Webhooks & API integrations

- Google Sheets automations & App Script



Voice AI Experience

At least one of:

- RetellAI

- Twilio Programmable Voice

- ElevenLabs

- AI call routing

- AI appointment-setting workflows



Advanced Workflow Logic

- Ability to map complex processes and automate them cleanly.

- Can work with multi-branch logic, queues, if/then rules, and layered automation.



Professional Attributes

- Highly accountable

- Fast problem-solver

- Organized & detail-driven

- Reliable deadlines

- Understands business ROI



Preferred Qualifications / Skills (Nice-to-Haves)

- Experience building AISDRs

- LangChain, ReAct agents, or custom AI pipelines

- Backend logic (JavaScript, Python, Node)

- Twilio Studio & call flows





Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Quality: Number of post-deployment issues

- Speed: Days from project start ? launch

- Reliability: On-time delivery rate

- Client Satisfaction: Feedback & retention

- System Performance: Speed, accuracy, uptime

- Documentation Quality: Completeness of SOPs



Success Measures

- Clients get automated systems delivered on time

- Zero critical automation failures

- Systems run reliably with clear documentation

- Clients experience increased bookings, speed, and conversion

- Ai Pro Partner can scale faster with clean workflows



Compensation

$TBD/hour (USD) to start — depending on:

- technical level

- voice AI experience

- automation depth

- API integration skills

Performance-based raises + bonuses for major client wins.



Contract Type

Full-Time within 30–90 days

Flexible schedule

Must overlap with U.S. business hours (EST–PST)



Location

Global, remote

Must have reliable internet, equipment, and English fluency.



Growth Path

Stage 1: Senior Tech VA / Automation Specialist

Stage 2: Lead Implementer (owns major client systems)

Stage 3: Head of AI Systems (manages multiple implementers)



Ideal Candidate Traits

Obsessed with technical builds

Takes pride in clean automations

Proactive communicator

Thinks in systems and workflows

Quick learner

Reliable and detail-driven

Sees client success as personal success



Example Tech Stack You’ll Use

Core / Automations:

N8N, Make, Zapier, GoHighLevel, ChatGPT, OpenAI API, Google Suite, API tools, JSON, Webhooks

Voice AI:

RetellAi, Twilio, ElevenLabs

Automation & Ops:

Slack, Instantly.ai,

title: Technical Virtual Assistant (Tech VA) — Senior Level
description:
**** DON'T JUST APPLY. READ EVERYTHING AND MAKE SURE YOU'RE A FIT.



Role Type

Technical Virtual Assistant (Tech VA) — Senior Level



Title

AI & Automation Systems Specialist

Seniority: Senior (with fast-track to Lead Tech / Head of Automation)



Mission of the Role

To architect, implement, and maintain world-class AI systems — including Voice AI, SDR automation, lead follow-up systems, CRM workflows, data syncing, and multichannel outreach — that significantly improve client communication, efficiency, and revenue.



BEFORE YOU GO ANY FURTHER. UNLESS YOU MEET THE REQUIREMENTS - DON'T APPLY. 



Technical Communication:

- Advanced English writing and speaking - we can't let language barrier to be an issue.  

- Able to translate technical info for non-technical terms. 



This Role Is NOT a Fit If Any of These Apply: 

- Poor communication: You are slow to respond, unclear in updates, fail to confirm receipt, or leave people guessing about status or next steps.

- Unreliable with time: You show up late, miss meetings or deadlines, or treat timelines and working hours as flexible.

- Inconsistent availability: You cannot maintain a stable schedule, disappear without notice, or frequently change availability.

- Lack of ownership: You need to be chased to complete work, shift responsibility, or see work as not a priority

- Excuse-driven execution: You miss deadlines, blame circumstances, or explain why something didn’t happen instead of solving the problem.

- Reactive mindset: You wait to be told what to do, don’t flag issues early, or fail to think ahead about risks and improvements.

- Low attention to detail: You cut corners, skip steps, avoid testing, or submit work without proper review.

- Resistance to structure: You dislike SOPs, avoid documentation, or push back against company policies.

- Defensive to feedback: You take correction personally, resist accountability, or fail to apply feedback quickly.

- Self-focused over team-focused: You prioritize personal convenience over team success, client outcomes, or long-term trust.



ONLY Proceed if ALL of These Apply: 



- Clear, proactive communicator: You respond quickly during working hours, confirm receipt, provide concise status updates, and communicate next steps without being asked.

- Highly reliable with time: You show up early or on time, respect meetings and deadlines, and treat commitments as non-negotiable.

- Consistently available and dependable: You maintain a stable schedule, communicate changes in advance, and ensure coverage and continuity.

- Strong ownership mindset: You take full responsibility for outcomes, follow through without reminders, and see work through to completion.

- Solution-oriented executor: When obstacles arise, you propose solutions, adjust plans, and keep progress moving—no excuses.

- Proactive and forward-thinking: You anticipate needs, flag risks early, suggest improvements, and think two steps ahead.

- Detail-oriented and quality-driven: You double-check your work, test before delivery, and take pride in accuracy and polish.

- System-first thinker: You follow SOPs, document processes, improve workflows, and leave clear handoffs so nothing depends on you alone.

- Coachability and maturity: You receive feedback professionally, implement it quickly, and continuously raise your standards.

- Team-first, mission-driven: You care about client outcomes, team success, and long-term trust more than personal convenience.



Key Responsibilities

AI System Architecture & Implementation

- Build advanced AI workflows using N8N, Make, Zapier, GoHighLevel, OpenAI API, and LangChain-style logic.

- Configure AISDRs, voice agents (RetellAi), and multi-step automations that handle inbound, outbound, nurturing, qualification, booking, and follow-up.



You will ensure every client’s system is:

- fast

- reliable

- error-free

- scalable

- and fully documented



Workflow Design & Mapping

Convert messy client processes into clean, automated systems (lead > follow-up > qualification > appointment > CRM sync).



Voice AI & Phone Automation

- Build and deploy AI voice agents using:

- Twilio / SIP integrations

- RetellAi, Whisper, ElevenLabs, or other LLM voice stacks

- Configure pre-call SMS flows, voi
 detection, call intelligence, routing, and appointment booking.



Data Integration & System Syncing

- Connect CRMs (Zoho, GHL, HubSpot, 
) with databases, Google Sheets, APIs, and 3rd-party tools.

- Ensure clean data flow and real-time updates between all systems.

- Apollo Auto Data Enrichment



API Connections & Webhooks

- Build and maintain API-based automations using HTTP requests, custom headers, authentication, and JSON parsing.



Client Fulfillment

- Execute high-quality technical builds from project briefs, client onboarding, or system audits.

- Provide timeline updates, project progress, and clear communication.



Quality Assurance

- Test every workflow end-to-end to ensure accuracy.

- Run failure scenarios, edge cases, and stress tests before launch.



Troubleshooting & Optimization

- Diagnose issues fast, without hand-holding.

- Propose automation upgrades and system optimizations proactively.



Documentation

- Create clean SOPs, diagrams, flowcharts, and configuration documentation for all automations.



Client Communication

- Join calls when needed to gather requirements, demo builds, or explain technical setups.



Continuous Learning

- Stay ahead of emerging AI tools, automation frameworks, and voice technologies.



Essential Qualifications / Skills (Must-Haves)



Automation Expertise = MUST be an EXPERT. Advanced knowledge. 



Strong, provable capability with:

- N8N (expert level)

- RetellAI

- Zapier

- Make (Integromat)

- GoHighLevel (GHL)

- OpenAI API

- ChatGPT Assistants, embeddings, prompt workflows

- Webhooks & API integrations

- Google Sheets automations & App Script

- UIPatch



Voice AI Experience

At least one of:

- RetellAI

- Twilio Programmable Voice

- ElevenLabs

- Whisper

- AI call routing

- AI appointment-setting workflows



Advanced Workflow Logic

- Ability to map complex processes and automate them cleanly.

- Can work with multi-branch logic, queues, if/then rules, and layered automation.



Professional Attributes

- Highly accountable

- Fast problem-solver

- Organized & detail-driven

- Reliable deadlines

- Understands business ROI



Preferred Qualifications / Skills (Nice-to-Haves)

- Experience building AISDRs

- LangChain, ReAct agents, or custom AI pipelines

- Backend logic (JavaScript, Python, Node)

- Twilio Studio & call flows



Experience with:

- Airtable

- Notion

- ClickUp automation

- Dripify / LinkedIn automation

- Instantly.ai setup & troubleshooting

- Basic UI/UX (Figma, Canva, Creatopy)

- Experience in B2B service sectors 



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Quality: Number of post-deployment issues

- Speed: Days from project start ? launch

- Reliability: On-time delivery rate

- Client Satisfaction: Feedback & retention

- System Performance: Speed, accuracy, uptime

- Documentation Quality: Completeness of SOPs



Success Measures

- Clients get automated systems delivered on time

- Zero critical automation failures

- Systems run reliably with clear documentation

- Clients experience increased bookings, speed, and conversion

- Ai Pro Partner can scale faster with clean workflows



Compensation

$TBD/hour (USD) to start — depending on:

- technical level

- voice AI experience

- automation depth

- API integration skills

Performance-based raises + bonuses for major client wins.



Contract Type

Part-Time to start ? Full-Time within 30–90 days

Flexible schedule

Must overlap with U.S. business hours (EST–PST)



Location

Global, remote

Must have reliable internet, equipment, and English fluency.



Growth Path

Stage 1: Senior Tech VA / Automation Specialist

Stage 2: Lead Implementer (owns major client systems)

Stage 3: Head of AI Systems (manages multiple implementers)



Ideal Candidate Traits

Obsessed with technical builds

Takes pride in clean automations

Proactive communicator

Thinks in systems and workflows

Quick learner

Reliable and detail-driven

Sees client success as personal success



Example Tech Stack You’ll Use

Core / Automations:

N8N, Make, Zapier, GoHighLevel, ChatGPT, OpenAI API, Google Suite, API tools, JSON, Webhooks

Voice AI:

RetellAi, Twilio, ElevenLabs

Automation & Ops:

ClickUp, Airtable, Slack, Notion, Loom, Dripify, Instantly.ai, 



NEXT STEPS: 



***IF YOU CAN'T FOLLOW DIRECTIONS, YOU'RE NOT A FIT. 



1. Send us message telling us why you're a fit. 

2. Confirm that you have expertise (not novice or average experience) with the tech stacks shared on this job description. 

3. Send a LOOM video, directed to specifically (Ai Prop Partner) showing examples of automations you've created, explain in a technical terms and then explain in lames terms. (DON'T SEND US THE GENERIC ONE YOU SEND EVERYONE ELSE)

title: Expert US Executive Assistant to the CEO (50 hours a week)
description:
About the Role

The Executive Assistant to the CEO serves as the operational backbone of Parity's strategic projects and organizational systems. You will build project timelines, track deliverables, manage cross-team communication, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks. The right person is detail-oriented, solutions-focused, and energized by helping teams turn vision into execution.



Key Responsibilities

Cross-Team Coordination



Coordinate and document strategic meetings, identifying next steps and responsible parties.

Manage projects using ClickUp and maintain accountability across teams.

Track deliverables, dependencies, and timelines across multiple initiatives.

Proactively flag delays, identify solutions, and adjust schedules as needed.

Maintain a central project calendar to ensure visibility of all major deadlines.

Administrative Support



Maintain and optimize the CEO's calendar, prioritizing key meetings and deadlines.

Coordinate internal and external meetings across multiple time zones.

Send reminders, prepare meeting briefs, and manage scheduling conflicts.

Monitor and organize the executive's inbox, drafting and sending professional communications.

Filter and prioritize messages to keep focus on strategic initiatives.

Written and Internal Communications



Draft and edit polished, brand-aligned written content such as
s, newsletters, blog posts, and internal memos.

Create client-facing materials including announcements, templates, and onboarding documents.

Maintain SOPs, team handbooks, and process documentation.

Travel and Event Coordination



Plan and manage travel logistics, including flights, accommodations, and ground transportation.

Prepare detailed itineraries and oversee travel budgets.

Organize virtual or in-person events, conferences, and client meetings.

Systems and Process Management



Support implementation and optimization of communication and documentation tools.

Identify process improvements and lead automation initiatives.

Create internal reports and dashboards to track KPIs and organizational impact.

Support evaluation and reporting of grant deliverables and partner-funded projects.



Qualifications

Minimum 3 years of experience as an Executive Assistant supporting senior leadership or a CEO.

Background in mass communication, media, or content writing preferred.

At least 2 years of experience working remotely in the Eastern Time Zone.

Exceptional organizational, time management, and multitasking skills.

Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

Proficiency with ClickUp, Microsoft Workspace, Zoom, and cloud-based file systems.

Strong initiative and independence in managing competing priorities.

Experience supporting virtual teams in a fully remote environment.

Role Information

Fully remote position

Approximate 50-hour work week



Schedule:  EST

Compensation: $1300 USD

title: Senior Amazon & Walmart Account Manager / Team Lead (Leadership Role – Paid Trial)
description:
Overview:

We are a U.S.-based Amazon & Walmart marketing agency looking for a Senior Account Manager / Team Lead to take ownership of client accounts, manage a remote team, and ensure all work is executed at a high level.



This is a leadership role first, execution second.



You will be responsible for:

-- Keeping accounts running smoothly

-- Ensuring tasks are completed on time

-- Managing tea
mbers

-- Communicating proactively

-- Solving problems before they escalate



We are hiring for this role at a senior level, but all candidates will go through a paid trial period to determine final placement within our internal tier structure based on real performance.



Core Responsibilities:

-- Own and manage multiple Amazon & Walmart client accounts

-- Lead and manage Account Specialists (task delegation, QA, follow-ups)

-- Ensure all daily, weekly, and monthly deliverables are completed on time

-- Monitor and optimize performance (SEO, PPC, TACOS, rankings)

-- Identify issues early and take ownership of solutions

-- Maintain full visibility across all accounts and tasks

-- Ensure proper communication across team and leadership

-- Manage workflows and task tracking in ClickUp

-- Step in directly when tasks are missed or at risk



Platform Requirements (Amazon + Walmart):



Amazon (Required)

-- Seller Central experience (2–4+ years)

-- SEO (keyword indexing, ranking, content optimization)

-- PPC (campaign structure, bidding, performance analysis)



Walmart (Required)

-- Experience with Walmart Seller Center

-- Listing setup and troubleshooting

-- Inventory and pricing management

-- Familiarity with WFS (Walmart Fulfillment Services)

-- Ability to identify and solve issues without relying on support



Non-Negotiable Requirements:

-- Proven experience leading or managing a team

-- Available 30–40 hours per week minimum

-- Daily overlap with PST business hours

-- Strong communication (same-day responses required)

-- High level of accountability and ownership

-- Ability to manage multiple accounts without supervision



Not a Fit If You:

-- Miss deadlines or fail to communicate proactively

-- Prefer task-based work instead of ownership

-- Need constant direction

-- Struggle with time management or availability

-- Are working multiple full-time jobs

-- Avoid responsibility or wait for instructions



How We Work:

-- We prioritize accountability, communication, and ownership

-- We do not micromanage — leaders manage themselves

-- Problems are expected to be solved, not escalated without effort

-- We operate fast and expect high standards

-- Our team supports real businesses — execution matters



Paid Trial (Important):

All candidates start with a paid trial (2–4 weeks).



During this period, you will:

-- Work on real client accounts

-- Be evaluated on communication, ownership, leadership, and execution



Final role placement (Team Lead, Senior Specialist, or lower tier) will be determined based on performance, not your resume.



What Success Looks Like:

-- Tasks are completed on time without follow-ups

-- Communication is proactive and consistent

-- Tea
mbers are aligned and accountable

-- Client issues are identified and resolved early

-- You operate as an owner, not a task executor



Compensation:

-- Based on experience and trial performance

-- Final rate aligned with internal tier structure

-- Growth based on consistency and leadership



Application Instructions:



To apply:



Send your resume

Include the phrase: I take ownership at the top

Answer the following:

-- What would you do if a client’s listing was down for 3 days and no one noticed?

-- How do you handle a tea
mber who is not responding?

-- How do you troubleshoot a suppressed Walmart listing without relying on support?

title: Content Organizer — Video Footage (Project-Based)
description:
We create social media content and need someone reliable to help us organize raw video footage after each shoot.



This is not a video editing role. The work is straightforward: watch clips, rename them using our system, and place them in the correct folders. We have a full SOP and a Loom video walkthrough that explains everything step by step.



---



What you'll do:



• Download raw footage from Google Drive

• Watch each clip and identify what's happening

• Rename clips following our naming system

• Place them in the correct folders

• Return the organized folder when done



---



What we're looking for:



• Detail-oriented — naming consistency matters a lot

• Fast learner — the system is simple but must be followed exactly

• Reliable — when we send footage, we need it back within an agreed timeframe

• Comfortable working independently with clear instructions



No experience with video editing required. Experience organizing files or working with content creators is a plus.



---



Work structure:



This is project-based work. We will send footage batches after shoots and pay in milestones throughout project workload. There will be a short paid trial ($5) to start so you can learn the system and we can see how you work.

title: AI Content & Systems Operator (Sports Performance Brand – APX)
description:
We are a growing sports performance business focused on speed, strength, and athletic development for youth athletes.



We are looking for someone to run our entire content system using AI tools, turning real coaching sessions into high-quality, structured social media content.



This is not a basic VA or “social media” role. You will be responsible for building a repeatable system that converts coaching into daily content.



The goal of this role is to allow the coach to focus only on recording sessions and occasional voiceovers, while you handle the rest of the content pipeline.





Your Main Responsibility



Turn raw coaching footage into structured, high-performing daily content.





Responsibilities



Review and organise training footage (individual and team sessions), identifying key coaching 
nts, athlete mistakes, and teaching points.



Transcribe video/audio using tools such as Whisper or similar.



Use AI tools such as Claude or ChatGPT to generate multiple hook angles for each concept, based on predefined topics (e.g. acceleration, anti-rotation, sprint mechanics).



Structure content into clear, simple formats with:



* Hook (multiple options)

* One core message

* Up to three supporting points

* Clip timestamps

* Caption

* Call to action



Create a clean content brief for each post and send clear instructions to the video editor so they can execute without confusion.



Suggest when a concept should be turned into a short voiceover, and provide a simple script for recording.



Manage posting and scheduling on Instagram, including:



* Uploading reels

* Writing captions in brand voice

* Adding hashtags and tags

* Selecting cover images

* Scheduling content using tools such as Buffer or similar



Track content performance (views, saves, engagement) and provide simple weekly summaries identifying which hook styles and topics perform best.



Continuously improve content by identifying successful patterns and doubling down on what works.





What We Are Looking For



Strong written English



Experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude



Ability to follow structured systems and processes



Clear thinking and ability to simplify ideas



Attention to detail and reliability



Interest in content creation and social media





Bonus (Not Required)



Interest in sports or fitness



Experience with short-form content (Instagram / TikTok)



Experience working with video editors





Trial Task (Required)



You will be given a short coaching clip.



You must:



* Create 3 hook options using different angles

* Identify one clear main message

* Write 3 simple bullet points explaining the concept

* Provide a short caption







Important



This role is focused on systems, structure, and consistency.



You are not required to “be creative” in a random way. You will be working from defined topics and improving content through structured testing.







Application Instructions



To apply, include the word “APX” at the start of your application and briefly explain how you would turn a coaching video into a structured piece of content.

title: Medical assistant

We are an Internal Medicine–led medical group providing care across SNFs, LTACs, acute hospitals, assisted living facilities, and home-based patients. We are seeking a highly organized, experienced Remote Medical Assistant to support both clinical and administrative operations.

Clinical & Administrative Support

EHR

title: Sales Closer – AI Receptionist for U.S. Small Businesses (Remote – Philippines)
description:
Company: LeadKeep

Schedule: Monday to Friday, split shift (6 hours total)



7:00 AM – 10:00 AM PHT (= 7:00 PM – 10:00 PM U.S. Eastern)

9:00 PM – 12:00 AM PHT (= 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM U.S. Eastern)



Compensation:



Base: $400 USD/month (paid weekly via PayPal)

Commission: $200 per closed deal ($250/deal after 10 deals/month)

Paid training: $100 in Week 1



Realistic earnings:



Month 1 (~25 calls, 30% close): $400 + $1,500 = $1,900

Month 2+ (~40 calls, 30% close): $400 + $2,500 = $2,900



What You'll Do:

Our cold call team books discovery calls with U.S. small business owners (hair salons, nail salons, day spas). You join a 30-min Zoom call, demo our AI receptionist, and close. You don't prospect or cold call — you only close.

Between calls, you review notes, follow up with prospects, and update the CRM (GoHighLevel). Think of it like a lifeguard — you need to be there and sharp, but you're not swimming the whole time.

Requirements:



Clear, professional English — you'll be on Zoom video with U.S. business owners

Real sales/closing experience — you've handled objections and asked for money

Confident on camera

Reliable internet + quiet environment

Residing in the Philippines



Nice-to-Have: B2B/SaaS sales, CRM experience (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce)

How to Apply:

Upload a VIDEO (on camera, under 3 min) to Google Drive answering these 2 questions:



"Pretend I'm a nail salon owner. I just told you: 'I already have a receptionist, I don't need an AI one.' Sell me anyway."

"Tell me about a time you closed a deal that seemed impossible. What did you do?"



No video = no review. We need to see how you present on Zoom.

If you're a good fit, we'll reach out directly.

 or Zapier

title: Social Media Content UGC Sourcing Outreach
description:
ROLE: UGC Sourcer / Creator Scout



TYPE: Long-term if you're good



WHO THIS IS FOR



- This is for someone who lives on TikTok, Instagram, and the internet in general.

- You do NOT need to be a corporate VA.

- You do NOT need to have years of experience.

- But you DO need to be sharp, fast, internet-native, and willing to learn.



WHO WE ARE



- We're building a content-driven app growth engine.

- Right now the first app is called Lockt.

- Lockt blocks distracting apps until the user walks their steps.

- Our job is to find normal creators who can film cheap raw iPhone clips for us.

- We post the content from our own accounts. We are paying for footage, not followers.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



1. Find creators on TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit who fit our app angles

2. Judge very quickly if someone is a fit or not

3. Add qualified leads to our tracker cleanly

4. DM qualified leads using our approved outreach

5. Update statuses every day so the pipeline stays clean

6. Send a short end-of-day report with numbers and learnings



THIS ROLE IS NOT



- customer support

- appointment setting

- generic admin work

- influencer management for big celebrities



It's internet research + creator sourcing + good judgment.



WHAT MAKES SOMEONE GOOD AT THIS



- you are naturally online and notice patterns fast

- you know what makes a person feel native on TikTok

- you can spot cringe / fake / over-produced content quickly

- you are comfortable doing repetitive work without getting sloppy

- you can follow a system but still think for yourself



REQUIRED



- Good written English

- Comfortable recording short Looms

- Comfortable using TikTok, Instagram, Reddit, Google Sheets / Notion

- Stable internet and a laptop

- Can work consistently, not disappear



NICE TO HAVE



- experience in sourcing, recruiting, lead gen, outreach, social media, or creator work

- experience finding people online for any role or offer

- understands Gen Z / 
 / app culture



PAY AND GROWTH



- $
/month to start depending on sharpness and availability

- paid bi-monthly via Wise

- performance bonuses can be added once you are producing real results

- path to full-time and bigger responsibility if you are strong



HOW TO APPLY



Do NOT send a long cover letter.

Keep it clean and follow instructions.



1. Subject line must start with: LOCKT



2. Send a 60-90 second Loom or selfie video answering these:

- your name, age, and city

- why this role fits you

- one TikTok / IG creator you think would be a good fit for Lockt and why

- what you think makes content high performing on TikTok, and how to scale this?



3. In the written part of your application, include:

- your TikTok and Instagram links

- your current work situation

- how many hours/week you can give us

- the words: SCREEN TIME

- 3 search keywords you would use to find Lockt-style creators



4. If shortlisted, we'll send you a paid trial task.



IMPORTANT

If you miss the keyword, the Loom, or the social links, we will not review the application.



We are looking for someone smart, hungry, and coachable.

If that's you, please apply.

title: Accounting and Tax Manager
description:
We are seeking a highly capable, sharp, and client-ready Manager of Accounting & Tax to join our firm. This is a senior role for someone who can operate at a high level across both tax and accounting services, with the judgment, technical strength, and communication skills to lead client work confidently.



This person must be able to perform partner-level income tax return reviews, while also stepping into return preparation when needed.



They should be well-versed in the broader accounting function, including areas such as payroll, payroll tax, sales tax, bookkeeping oversight, and related client support. Just as important, this person must be an excellent communicator who can interact with clients clearly, professionally, and confidently.



This role is ideal for someone who combines strong technical knowledge with ownership, responsiveness, and sound judgment.



Key Responsibilities

Review business and individual income tax returns at a high technical level, with the ability to catch issues, identify risks, and improve quality before finalization



Assist with tax return preparation as needed, especially during busy periods or when complexity requires senior involvement



Support and oversee accounting services for clients, including bookkeeping review, payroll, payroll tax, sales tax, and related compliance work



Answer technical questions from staff and help troubleshoot accounting and tax issues across client accounts



Communicate directly with clients regarding tax matters, accounting issues, deadlines, open items, and recommendations



Review financial information for accuracy, reasonableness, and completeness

Identify issues proactively and help drive clean, practical resolutions



Support internal staff by reviewing work, providing feedback, and helping maintain quality standards



Help manage deadlines and ensure work moves forward accurately and on time across multiple clients



Step into complex client matters with confidence and professionalism





Required Qualifications



-Active CPA required

-Strong experience in US public accounting across both tax and accounting services

-Ability to perform high-level review of income tax returns, with judgment consistent with a senior manager or partner-track professional

-Ability and willingness to also prepare returns when needed

-Strong working knowledge of accounting services, including bookkeeping, payroll, payroll tax, sales tax, and related client compliance matters

-Strong written and verbal English communication skills

-Ability to communicate directly with clients in a polished, clear, and confident manner

-Ability to work U.S. business hours, with ET preferred

-Strong attention to detail, sound judgment, and ability to work independently





What We Are Looking For



Own It

Takes responsibility for client work, deadlines, and outcomes

Follows through consistently and does not let issues sit

Steps into problems directly and helps solve them

Can be trusted with important client matters without hand-holding



Lead With Value and Clarity

Communicates clearly with clients and tea
mbers

Gives direct, thoughtful, useful guidance

Makes technical matters easier for others to understand and act on

Produces work and feedback that are organized, practical, and high value



Speed and Accuracy

Works efficiently without cutting corners

Maintains strong quality under pressure

Meets deadlines and keeps work moving

Produces careful work with minimal rework



Why This Role Matters

This is a key leadership-level seat within the firm. The right person will help strengthen technical quality, support staff, improve client confidence, and ensure both tax and accounting work are handled with a high degree of competence and professionalism

title: Full-Time AI Developer, Long-Term Role with Growing US Company
description:
About us:

We're a commercial security integration company based in New Jersey, serving business clients across the US northeast. Our work spans structured cabling, IP surveillance, access control, and network infrastructure. The company is growing and we're building out internal tools and adjacent ventures that need a dedicated developer on the team.



The first project on the roadmap is a valuation and inventory tool for networking and security hardware. Beyond that there's a steady pipeline of internal tools, client-facing portals, automation work, and future products. We're hiring for the long term, not for a single build.



Who we want to hire:

Someone who uses AI coding tools heavily and has strong fundamentals underneath. Both matter, equally.

We're not interested in developers who refuse to use Claude Code because "real devs write every line themselves." We're also not interested in developers who only know how to prompt and fall apart when Claude produces broken output. The people we want are the ones who ship 3x faster with AI because they know exactly when to trust it, when to override it, and when to throw the output away and write it by hand.



If you can read a stack trace, reason about why a query is slow, design a schema without AI help, and debug code Claude got subtly wrong, you're the profile. If you need AI to do those things for you, you're not.



We're looking for someone who wants a stable, well-paid, long-term role with one client instead of juggling freelance gigs. Someone who takes ownership, documents their work, and gets sharper every quarter.



What you'll work on:

Primary project: valuation tool (MPN matching, scraping, valuation database)

Internal tools for the integration business (quoting, inventory, client portals)

Automation and data work across the company

Future ventures and products as we grow



Claude Code will be your main development environment.



Required:

2+ years building production web apps or data tools in Python or Node

Strong fundamentals in networking, servers, and navigating infrastructure

Strong fundamentals: can explain your own code, debug without AI when needed, reason about performance and data modeling from first principles

Fluent daily use of Claude Code, Cursor, or similar. Real leverage from these tools, not avoidance and not over-reliance

Solid Postgres or similar relational DB, can write non-trivial SQL by hand

Experience with web scraping and API integration

Git discipline: branches, small commits, clean history

Strong written and spoken English. 

Reliable daily availability



Nice to have:

E-commerce or reselling experience

Networking or physical security hardware familiarity

Queue systems (Redis, Celery) and scheduled jobs

React for internal dashboards

Any DevOps: Docker, deployment, basic infra



This role is not for you if:

You only know how to prompt AI and can't debug what it produces

You refuse to use AI tools because you prefer writing everything by hand

You're juggling multiple clients

You need detailed instructions for every task

You can't clearly explain the logic behind work you've shipped

Your written or spoken English is limited

You're looking for a slow, comfortable role



How we work:

End-of-day written update

Milestone-based planning in 1 to 2 week chunks

Diff reviews daily early on, less often once trust is built

PTO



How to apply

Include all five or your application will be skipped:



1. Loom video, maximum 4 minutes. Cover: who you are, walk us through one real project you've built (explain the logic and your decisions, not just the tech stack), how you use Claude Code day to day including where it fails you, and why this role fits what you want next. Be natural, do not read from a script. We want to see how you think.



2. Link to something you've built. Repo, live project, or detailed writeup. Be clear about what was yours vs team work, and what was AI-assisted vs hand-written.



3. Describe a specific time Claude Code (or similar) produced output you had to reject or heavily rewrite. What did it get wrong, how did you catch it, what did you do instead. Be specific. Vague answers tell us you don't actually catch the mistakes.



4. Describe a specific time AI tooling let you ship something you couldn't have shipped alone, or shipped 5x faster than you would have. What was the task and what was your workflow.



Applications missing any of these will be ignored.

title: Tier 2 Website Builder & Maintenance Specialist
description:
We're a website services company that builds and maintains websites for clients across a range of industries. We're growing and looking for a talented Tier 2 Website Builder & Maintenance Specialist with excellent English fluency and customer service skills to join our remote team on a full-time basis.



Role 2: Website Builder & Maintenance Specialist (Tier 2)

Full-Time | Remote



About the Role:



This is a build-and-maintain role — you'll be designing and building new website templates from scratch on WordPress and Wix, and taking ownership of the ongoing monthly maintenance for a portfolio of client sites. You're equally comfortable opening a blank canvas and crafting a polished site as you are logging in each month to keep existing sites healthy and up to date.



What You'll Do:



- Design and build new website templates for clients using WordPress (Elementor, Divi, or block editor) and Wix (Editor X / Studio)

- Translate client briefs, brand guidelines, and content into fully functional, mobile-responsive websites

- Create reusable, handoff-ready templates for repeat use across similar client types

- Perform all Tier 1 maintenance duties: monthly content uploads, image optimisation, mobile/desktop QA

- Run monthly performance and health checks across a portfolio of client websites

- Prepare and deliver monthly client reports covering new builds in progress and maintenance activity

- Identify opportunities to improve existing client sites and flag these proactively



You'll Need:



- Proven experience building websites on WordPress (Elementor or Divi strongly preferred) and Wix Studio / Editor X

- A strong eye for layout, typography, and brand-aligned design

- Ability to work from a brief and produce clean, professional results without heavy hand-holding

- Experience with image optimisation and ensuring cross-device responsiveness

-  Confidence managing multiple projects and client sites with competing deadlines

- Excellent English fluency and strong written and verbal communication for client-facing reports and updates



Bonus Points For:



- Experience building template libraries or reusable component sets

- Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS for small custom tweaks within WordPress

- Familiarity with WooCommerce or Wix eCommerce

- Prior agency or freelance experience managing client expectations



Here's what the role looks like week to week:



- new website template builds (you design and build from a client brief on WordPress and/or Wix)

- new custom client website build (bespoke builds tailored to individual clients)

- template fills (uploading content into existing templates, ready to go live in a small turnaround time)

- Monthly maintenance across a portfolio of client websites — content uploads, image optimisation, mobile and desktop QA, and a simple monthly report per client



This is a full-time position, paid fortnightly.

description:

title: AD CREATIVE DESIGNER
description:
About the Role



Day After Maria is a US-based creative production studio that delivers AI-generated ad kits to small businesses — beauty brands, med spas, restaurants, and e-commerce stores. Our flagship product ships 60 AI images, 2 ad creatives, and Canva templates to clients within 48 hours.



We're looking for a detail-oriented Design Assistant who can take a creative brief and a set of finished AI images and turn them into polished ad creatives and Canva templates — fast and accurately. This is a production-focused role: you'll work from a brief, not build strategy.



What You'll Do



•Build polished ad creatives in Adobe Illustrator — square and vertical formats — from AI-generated imagery and a creative brief

•Design Canva templates with brand colors, typography, and layouts applied accurately to the brief

•Adapt layouts across formats while maintaining visual consistency and brand integrity

•Apply feedback and revise designs quickly — typically within a 3-hour turnaround



Tools You Must Know



Required (non-negotiable)

Adobe Illustrator 

Canva 

Google Drive 


 



Nice to have

Midjourney 

Fal.ai

Hubstaff





What We're Looking For

•Strong attention to detail — brand colors, fonts, and mood in the brief are non-negotiable

•Able to complete a project within a 10-hour window from brief receipt

•Works independently and proactively asks for work when your queue is empty

•Responds to project assignments in 
 within 1 hour during shift hours

•Available on weekends when production volume is high

•Reliable internet connection and capable computer setup



Schedule & Pay

Pay Rate $7.00 USD per hour

Shift: 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM PHT  

Weekends: Required during high-volume periods

Trial Period 1–3 paid trial days at agreed rate before full onboarding



This is not a client-facing role. You will never communicate directly with clients. Image generation is handled separately — you work from a finished image set. Think of it as the final production step before a client receives their kit.



Application Questions

Include answers to all 6 questions in your message. Applications missing any answer will not be reviewed.



1.What hours are you available, and are you able to work weekends when needed?

2.Describe a time you ran out of tasks at work. What did you do?

3.What tools do you use daily, and how comfortable are you learning new software?

4.What is your internet speed and computer setup? Paste a screenshot from 
 or speedtest.net.

5.Why do you want to work for a creative studio specifically?

6.Share links to 3 examples of your best work. At least one should be a flyer or ad creative.



HOW TO APPLY

 your application to:





Use this exact subject line: AD CREATIVE DESIGNER – [Your Name] – Ready to Start



Applications without this exact subject line will not be reviewed.

title: Track and Trace Assistant
description:
GH Logistics is a high performance freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. We move quickly, but we move with structure. Our operation is built on real time visibility, disciplined execution, and clear communication. We take pride in keeping freight organized, on track, and moving cleanly from pickup to delivery. If you’re someone who enjoys staying engaged, solving live challenges, and being part of a fast moving operations team, you’ll feel right at home here.



Role Overview

As a Track & Trace Assistant, you serve as part of the operational backbone, ensuring shipments are accurately monitored, risks are identified early, and critical information reaches the right people at the right time. if you thrive behind the scenes keeping operations running smoothly, this role is an excellent fit.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Updating assigned sections of the Tracking Dashboard with accurate ETAs, locations, mileage, and notes

• Communicating with carriers via
 and internal channels to gather updates or resolve missing information

• Verifying that carriers are properly assigned, accepted, and actively tracking in required platforms

• Monitoring multiple communication channels to prevent missed updates

• Proactively flagging delays, risks, and irregularities, and escalating when necessary

• Coordinating with the Booking Team to confirm ETAs for time sensitive shipments

• Ensuring clean shift handoffs through verbal (Zoom) and written updates

• Follows instructions consistently and executes with precision

• Team oriented, coachable, and open to feedback without ego



What Success Looks Like

• Assigned tracking sections are consistently accurate and up to date

• Scheduled updates are sent on time

• Critical shipments are monitored closely and handled with urgency from start to finish

• Carrier tracking and acceptance issues are caught early

• Issues are communicated clearly, both verbally and in writing

• Shift handoffs are smooth, complete, and well documented



Who We’re Looking For

• Has experience in US logistics, freight brokerage, or track & trace

• Familiar with US geography and US logistics trucking operations (a plus)

• Highly organized and comfortable working with multiple spreadsheets, dashboards, and group chats

• Understands urgency and prioritization in a live freight environment

• Communicates clearly and professionally via chat and

• Can monitor multiple shipments at once without losing accuracy

• Pays strong attention to detail and uses sound judgment when issues arise

• Follows instructions consistently and values clean processes

• Works well with a team and is open to feedback and coaching. Collaborates without resistance or ego



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Independent Contractor Setup

• $75 monthly insurance stipend (eligibility begins 30 days after hire)

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance based advancement



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time Remote Role| Direct Hire to US Company

• Current Shift Availability: Monday - Friday 7 AM - 5 PM CDT & Saturday 7 AM - 12 PM CDT

• Other shifts (only if assigned): 3 PM - 1 AM CDT & 11 PM - 9 AM CDT

• Zoom presence (with camera open and unmuted audio) required

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support



This role is built for someone who genuinely enjoys following freight in motion, monitoring shipments, confirming updates, and making sure deliveries stay on track. If you like staying proactive, spotting risks before they become problems, and keeping operations running smoothly behind the scenes, you’ll fit right in.



Apply Here: 
/team/
/GHApplicationForm



Visit us:

title: Track and Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance
description:
GH Logistics is a growing freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. Our team is built on strong systems, clear communication, and reliable execution. As we continue to scale nationally, we are looking for a Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance to help ensure that every load is verified, compliant, and properly tracked before it moves. If you’re someone who notices the small details, enjoys organized processes, and takes pride in preventing problems before they happen this role may be a great fit.

Your work directly prevents missed pickups, tracking gaps, compliance issues, and communication breakdowns while collaborating closely with Operations, Sales, and Management to ensure loads move smoothly and safely with clear SOPs, structured workflows, and strong team support to help you succeed.



What You’ll Be Doing

Who We’re Looking For

• Follow SOPs consistently

• Communicate clearly with drivers and internal teams

• Are open to feedback and continuous improvement

Work Setup & Schedule

If you take pride in doing things right and preventing issues before they happen, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Senior Associate -- Bookkeeping and Client Services
description:
We are looking for a virtual bookkeeper and client liaison who is ready to take full ownership of one U.S. client

account. In this role, you will not just be handling the numbers -- you will be the face of the service for that client,

communicating regularly and ensuring their financial records are accurate and well-maintained. If you are a

self-starter who thrives in a remote setup and takes pride in high-quality work, we would love to hear from you.



Job Responsibilities

• Manage day-to-day bookkeeping and financial records for one dedicated U.S. client

• Serve as the primary point of contact for the assigned client, handling regular communication, responding to

inquiries, and providing financial updates

• Process accounts payable and receivable, perform bank reconciliations, and maintain accurate general ledger

records

• Prepare and review financial reports including profit and loss statements, balance sheets, and cash flow

summaries

• Ensure all transactions are recorded accurately and in compliance with U.S. accounting standards

• Identify and escalate discrepancies or irregularities in a clear and professional manner

• Use cloud-based accounting tools such as QuickBooks Online, Xero, or similar platforms

• Maintain organized digital records and documentation in accordance with established workflows



Requirements

• 2 to 4 years of bookkeeping, accounting, or finance-related experience (experience in a bookkeeping firm, BPO

finance, or CPA practice is an advantage)

• Solid working knowledge of bookkeeping principles, financial statements, and general accounting practices

• Proficiency in at least one cloud-based accounting platform such as QuickBooks Online, Xero, Wave, or

FreshBooks

• Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to interact clearly and professionally

with U.S.-based clients

• Comfortable managing an ongoing client relationship with minimal supervision

• Strong attention to detail, high numerical accuracy, and solid organizational skills

• Reliable internet connection and a dedicated remote work setup

• Willing to work East Coast U.S. hours (EST)



Added Advantage

• Experience supporting U.S.-based clients in a remote or offshore capacity

• Familiarity with U.S. tax reporting basics such as 1099s, sales tax, or payroll

• Background in a bookkeeping firm, CPA practice, or finance outsourcing company

• Degree in BS Accountancy, BS Accounting Technology, or a related field

title: HUGE COMMISSION:  Cold Call B2B And Schedule Appointments
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 hard working appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me. I am looking to hire immediately.



I help small business owners with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads, leads are not provided.

-- Call 80+ small business owners and offer them a free consultation to learn about A.I.

-- Schedule them for a free consultation if they seem interested.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You are not someone who relies on your hourly wage, but someone who is motivated by performance and earning more through high commissions.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



HOURS:

-- Part time (20 hours) to start, with the option to do full time after 30 days.

-- Monday - Friday 10AM-2PM Pacific Standard Time (Tuesday - Saturday 1AM-5AM Philippine Time).



PAYMENT:

-- $4/hour base

-- $20 each qualified appointment that shows up



-- 1st monthly sale = $100

-- 2nd monthly sale = $150 ($250 total)

-- 3rd monthly sale = $300 ($550 total)

-- 4th monthly sale = $350 ($900 total)

-- 5th monthly sale = $400 ($1,300 total)



MATH EXAMPLE (At Only 3 Sold + 12 Show-Ups)

-- 20 hours/week at $4/hour ($320)

-- 12 show-ups ($240)

-- 3 sold ($550)

-- Total: $1,110/month

-- Most new reps aim for 2-3 per month - that's where you can do very well here.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.

-- Put "Dial And Smile" as your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling business to business and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) What is more important to you (a base hourly to be safe, or huge commissions to earn even more money):

title: Behavioral Health Practice Operations Supervisor (Remote – Full-Time)
description:
About the Role



We are a growing U.S.-based behavioral health / psychiatry practice. We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Operations Supervisor to oversee and optimize day-to-day administrative and operational functions of the practice.



This is not a basic virtual assistant role. This position includes team supervision, operational leadership, and ownership of core practice functions, including front office operations, billing coordination, clinical support staff oversight, and support of marketing initiatives. The ideal candidate is both a leader and a hands-on contributor when needed.



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Workflow Management

- Oversee daily administrative operations of a telehealth psychiatry practice

- Monitor and optimize provider scheduling and patient flow

- Identify workflow inefficiencies and implement scalable improvements

- Assist office manager in the creation, implementation, and ongoing maintenance of policy and procedure manuals (SOPs)



Team Supervision & Leadership

- Supervise and support administrative and clinical support staff, including Front office team

Billing personnel, and Office nurse

- Foster a positive, accountable, and collaborative team environment

- Monitor team performance, productivity, and responsiveness

- Support hiring, onboarding, and training of new tea
mbers

- Promote employee satisfaction, retention, and professional growth



Billing Oversight & Revenue Cycle Coordination

- Oversee billing workflows to ensure accuracy and timeliness

- Monitor claims lifecycle from submission to payment

- Identify and troubleshoot claim denials or delays

- Coordinate with billing staff to resolve insurance-related issues

- Ensure proper insurance verification and prior authorization processes are followed

- Maintain awareness of CPT coding (e.g., 99214, 90837, add-on codes) and payer expectations



Patient Coordination & Escalation Management

- Ensure smooth scheduling, rescheduling, and patient communication processes

- Maintain high standards for patient experience and responsiveness

- Handle escalated patient concerns professionally and effectively, including sensitive or complex behavioral health situations

mbers are out (e.g., front office, billing support, patient coordination)

- Assist with overflow tasks, including patient calls, scheduling, insurance verification, and billing coordination

Marketing & Growth Support

- Assist with marketing initiatives and projects to support practice growth

- Support social media management, including content coordination, posting, and engagement

- Help track and organize marketing efforts and basic performance metrics

- Coordinate with leadership on implementation of marketing strategies

- Track key operational tasks and ensure timely completion

- Provide regular updates on operations, risks, and opportunities for improvement



Required Qualifications

- 3+ years experience in behavioral health, psychiatry, or mental health practice settings (REQUIRED)

- Prior experience in a lead, supervisory, or management capacity

- Strong understanding of U.S. behavioral health workflows and practice operations

- Experience with Insurance verification,  Claims processes and troubleshooting & Medical scheduling and patient coordination

- Excellent mastery of the English language (written and spoken)

- Demonstrated ability to handle escalated or sensitive patient situations

- Strong leadership, team-building, and communication skills

- Highly organized with strong problem-solving ability

- Ability to be both strategic and hands-on when needed



Preferred Qualifications (Still Valued)

- Experience with EHR systems (e.g., SimplePractice, Kareo, Athenahealth, etc.)

- Background in revenue cycle management (RCM)

- Experience managing remote teams

- Experience supporting marketing or social media initiatives



Work Schedule (Strict Requirement) 

- Full-time (40 hours/week), 

- Must work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

- This schedule is required for real-time coordination with patients and staff



Compensation

- Competitive (based on experience and leadership background)

What We’re Looking For

- A confident leader who can manage and develop a team

- Someone who takes ownership of operations, not just assigned tasks

- A professional who is comfortable stepping in wherever needed to support the team

- Strong problem-solver with the ability to troubleshoot complex issues (especially billing/claims)

- A leader who understands the unique needs and sensitivities of behavioral health patients and workflows



PLEASE BE SURE TO INCLUDE RESUME.



Applicants without resume submission demonstrating direct behavioral health or psychiatry experience will not be considered.



We are seeking a long-term tea
mber who can grow into a key leadership role within the organization and help build a high-functioning, patient-centered practice.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist (SEO/PPC) & Office Assistant
description:
We are looking for a highly versatile and data-driven professional to fill a unique hybrid role that blends comprehensive Digital Marketing (SEO, PPC, and Paid Ads) with WordPress website management, office administration, and client relations. If you are passionate about driving digital growth and thrive in a dynamic, customer-focused environment, we would love to meet you!



Key Responsibilities

Website Management: Update and maintain website content, build high-converting landing pages, and publish blog posts using WordPress, ensuring optimal site health and user experience.



PPC & Paid Ads Management: Create, manage, and continuously optimize paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms (e.g., Google Ads, Meta/Facebook Ads, LinkedIn) to maximize ROI.



SEO Strategy & Execution: Conduct thorough keyword research, optimize WordPress pages (on-page SEO), and execute link-building or outreach campaigns (off-page SEO) to drive organic traffic.



Marketing & AI Integration: Utilize modern AI software and marketing tools to generate compelling ad copy, optimize written content, and streamline campaign creation.



Performance Tracking: Monitor web analytics, track ad spend, measure conversion rates, and generate regular performance reports to guide strategy.



Systems Management: Manage customer CRM systems, update records, and coordinate seamless communication between clients and the internal team.



Office Administration & Client Relations: Handle incoming phone calls, schedule appointments, and maintain excellent, professional customer communications.



Requirements

Proven experience in Digital Marketing, with a strong track record in managing SEO and Paid Advertising/PPC campaigns (required).



Hands-on experience managing, designing, and updating content via WordPress.



Proficiency in ad platforms (Google Ads,
 Ads Manager) and industry-standard SEO/analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics 4, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush).



High proficiency in spoken and written English (required).



Excellent organizational, multitasking, and time-management skills with strict attention to detail.



Availability to work a flexible schedule, including morning and evening hours (Florida Time / Eastern Time).



Bonus: Previous experience in an administrative, office management, or dedicated customer service role is a significant advantage.



Why Join Us?

Excellent Terms: Competitive compensation and benefits.



Great Culture: A supportive, collaborative, and family-like work environment.



Career Growth: We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who wants to grow, develop, and build a career with our company.



How to Apply

We’d love to see what you can do! Please complete our official application form here:





Important Note:

To ensure all candidates are reviewed fairly and efficiently, we are only accepting applications submitted through the form linked above.



Applications sent via
 will not be considered.

Due to the core responsibilities of this role, only candidates who demonstrate a strong understanding of digital marketing, WordPress, and relevant past successes in managing SEO and ad campaigns will be invited to move forward for an interview and skills assessment.

title: Full-Time Personal Assistant (Hybrid, Manila) — Founder Support Across Multiple Projects
description:
About the role

I'm a founder running several active projects (mobile apps, web platforms, and personal ventures) and I need a sharp, reliable Personal Assistant to work alongside me day-to-day. This is a full-time, hybrid role based in Manila — you'll split time between working in person with me and handling tasks remotely. I don't need someone who just executes tasks — I need a thinking partner who can reason through problems, spot what I'm missing, and bring creative solutions to the table.



What you'll do



Manage my calendar, inbox, and daily schedule

Coordinate across my different projects — tracking deadlines, follow-ups, and deliverables

Handle personal errands and logistics (appointments, bookings, deliveries, light household coordination)

Draft
s, messages, and documents on my behalf

Research topics, vendors, tools, or people — and come back with a recommendation, not just raw info

Take notes in meetings and make sure nothing falls through the cracks

Use AI tools (especially Claude) as a core part of your workflow — drafting, summarizing, researching, brainstorming, automating repetitive work

Jump in on ad-hoc tasks — anything that frees up my time to focus on building

You're a great fit if you



Are based in Metro Manila and able to meet in person several days per week

Have 2+ years of experience as an EA, PA, or operations assistant

Are a strong critical thinker — you ask "why" before "how," and push back when something doesn't make sense

Are creative and resourceful — when you hit a wall, you find three ways around it

Actively use Claude (or ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.) in your daily work and can show me how

Write clear, professional English

Are extremely organized — Notion, Google Workspace, and task managers are second nature

Follow through without being reminded

Can keep information confidential and exercise good judgment

Are comfortable with technology and fast to pick up new tools

Nice to have



Experience supporting founders, executives, or creatives

Familiarity with project management tools (Linear, Asana, Trello, etc.)

Prompt engineering experience or a clear point of view on how to get the best out of AI

Background in admin, operations, or hospitality

Schedule



Full-time, Monday–Friday, with some flexibility

Hybrid: Some days in person in BGC, remainder remote

How to apply

Send me a short message with:



A 1-paragraph intro about yourself and why this role fits

A specific example of how you've used Claude or another AI tool to solve a real problem — what was the problem, how did you prompt it, what was the outcome?

A time you pushed back on a boss, client, or colleague and why you turned out to be right

The phrase "pancit canton" somewhere in your reply (so I know you read this)

title: A.I video creator
description:

You will be trained on everything through our full in-house training course. Previous experience with AI image and video generation is required. You'll make 3 videos per day, and work Monday to Saturday 5-6 hours/day.



You will be rewarded generously with bonuses when videos go viral. I have over 2,000,000+ followers so good quality videos go viral regularly.

• Can work Monday to Saturday, 5–6 hours/day 

• Strong English

• Able to receive payments through Wise



HOW TO APPLY



Record ONE video answering all the questions below. Upload it along with one AI video you've previously made to a Google Drive folder and submit the link to me in your application.

APPLICATION QUESTIONS:

2. Are you in school or currently working?

6. Walk us through how you created an A.I video before.

title: Amazon online arbitrage / A2A / A2A EU virtual assistant (Minimum 1 year previous experience)
description:
***MINIMUM 1 YEAR EXPERIENCE IS A MUST, DO NOT APPLY IF YOU CANNOT SHOW ME PREVIOUS EXAMPLE LEADS. AS I WILL IGNORE YOUR APPLICATION***



Job Description:



We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to join our team on a full-time basis. The ideal candidate will have proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market, a bonus would be having A2A sourcing skills and A2A EU sourcing skills this will make you stand out compared to the other candidates. If you have A2A experience please highlight this in your application as well as when you send over your previous example leads



We are currently in search of 2 full time virtual assistants



Having experience with Keepa product finder is a must as this is the tool we use to find majority of the leads as well as experience with Seller amp as this is what we use to analyse the deals



Responsibilities:

• Source unique, high-profit and medium-profit deals on Amazon UK, focusing on high-ticket niches such as electronics, home & kitchen, toys, Computers and accessories. (Anything with a sell price of above £50 NO MAKEUP) 

• Ensure all leads are exclusive and not shared with other clients.

• Deliver high-quality, consistent sourcing leads in a timely manner.

• Present leads in a well-organized Excel sheet format with all necessary data points (e.g., cost price, Amazon selling price, profit, ROI, ASIN, etc.).

• Using coupons and taking into account student discount etc when sourcing. 

•Source from unique websites and ensure they are legit and not scam websites by checking trustpilot



Requirements:

• Proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market – this is non-negotiable.

• Must be able to provide examples of previous sourcing work.

• Each deal should have a minimum profit of £10 and a minimum ROI of 20%.

•No oversaturated brands/websites such as Ryobi, Milwaukee, notino and etc

• Must be reliable, detail-oriented, and trustworthy – we value loyalty and hard work, and we take care of our tea
mbers who are committed and dedicated.

• Strong communication skills and the ability to follow instructions independently.

• All leads must be exclusive and not reused or recycled across other clients.



If you’ve read this far and would like to apply, please use the word “Ready” in your application title so I know you have read and understood everything, without this title I will ignore your application. You must also apply with your previous work/example of deal sheet. Without this we will not read your application.



Must also be able to find 5-10 high quality leads a day within the specified criteria above. Your previous work/deal sheet should highlight this.



To get a better understanding of what we require I have attached a training proposal below, please ensure you read it thoroughly to understand our expectations 









Thank you I look forward to your applications and viewing your previous results



Salary will be discussed once you apply. Starting is £250 a month with performance based bonuses and base salary increase out our discretion.
