title: Real Estate Content Partner & High-Retention Video Strategist
description:
Overview: I am a licensed Realtor in the Austin, Texas market (serving Austin, Round Rock, Pflugerville, Hutto, and Elgin). I am looking for a long-term Content Partner to help me turn market data, inventory trends, and local insights into high-performing short-form video (Reels/TikTok).



The "Two-Way Street" Philosophy: I will provide the raw footage and the market data but I also need you to provide the strategy and execution. I want someone who can tell me: "Raul, that hook was a bit slow, try saying this instead," or "Film this specific angle so I can flash the inventory graph over your shoulder."



I am looking for a long-term partner to grow with my business.



Key Responsibilities:

- Strategy & Hook Writing: Review my market data and suggest "scroll-stopping" hooks and scripts before I film.

- High-Retention Editing: Edit 60-second Reels with fast cuts, "punch-ins," dynamic captions, and pattern interrupts.

- Data Visualization: Take static MLS/Inventory charts and animate them so they are easy for a homeowner or homebuyer to understand.

- Creative Direction: Provide weekly feedback on my lighting, audio, and delivery to help me improve as the "face" of the brand.

- B-Roll Management: Incorporate local neighborhood clips to keep the visuals "flashing."

- Strategic Thinking: understand the difference between a "viral" video and a "lead-generating" video for real estate.

- Hispanic Market: I want to tap into the austin hispanic market so let me know if you also speak spanish.



How to Apply:

- Send a link to your portfolio specifically highlighting short-form, high-retention edits.

- Tell me: What are 2 things most Real Estate videos get WRONG when it comes to keeping a viewer's attention?



Please include the word "AUSTIN" at the top of your application so I know you read this.

title: GHL & Marketing Automation Specialist
description:
Overview 

We are looking for a GHL & Marketing Automation Specialist to take ownership of our CRM and marketing infrastructure across our ecosystem. This role acts as the operational backbone of our marketing systems, ensuring that our CRM, automation workflows, and campaign infrastructure are properly configured, maintained, and continuously optimized. You will work closely with founders and the marketing team to build scalable systems that support lead generation, nurturing, and conversion.





Work Structure & Requirements

Timezone: UK Timezone - 20 hours per week



Key Responsibilities

• Configure, manage, and optimize Go High Level (GHL) as the central CRM.

• Build and maintain
 automation workflows, funnels, and lifecycle sequences.

• Set up and manage voice AI automations.

• Support newsletter automation and campaign execution.

• Integrate paid advertising channels into CRM workflows.

• Centralize and manage multi-channel marketing touchpoints including
, social, and ads.

• Build and maintain reporting dashboards and performance tracking systems.

• Ensure clean data, segmentation, and pipeline visibility within the CRM.

• Continuously improve automation systems to increase efficiency and performance.



Ideal Candidate Profile

• Hands-on experience working with Go High Level (GHL).

• Background in marketing automation, CRM systems, or SaaS environments.

• Strong understanding of funnels, lifecycle marketing, and lead management.

mber

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

 regarding outstanding payments.

-Experience using third-party vendor portals and ERP systems.

-Excellent communication skills with the ability to handle payment issues professionally.

-Strong sense of ownership, urgency, and attention to detail.

-Experience in collections within the services space and multi-state environments is a plus.



Requirements:



-Updated Resume/CV

-Ability to work in a full-time remote setup

-Strong organizational and follow-through skills

-Comfortable handling high-volume billing tasks in a fast-paced environment

-Customer-focused and solutions-oriented mindset



Benefits:



-Competitive salary based on experience and market standards

-Performance-based incentives tied to billing accuracy and DSO reduction

-Opportunity to take real ownership in a growing business environment

- WFH set-up

- HMO



Apply Now!

description:

I’m an independent visual artist specializing in street-art stencils and ’60s pop-art-inspired pieces. My work often riffs on political satire and urban culture. I’m looking to build a loyal following and amplify my voice across TikTok and Instagram—with the possibility to extend into
 Reels and YouTube Shorts.

• Trend Research & Strategy: Monitor emerging TikTok and IG trends, sounds, hashtags, and optimal posting schedules.

 Reels/YouTube Shorts or basic After Effects skills.

3. Provide 3–5 samples of your video edits or design work.

title: Remote Virtual Assistant – Full-Time | SuperSplitter Law School Consulting | Remote (Philippines-based) | $1,000/month
description:
ABOUT US

SuperSplitter is a fast-growing consulting agency specializing in helping nontraditional students get into US law schools. Older applicants, applicants with kids, applicants with lower GPAs, applicants with a criminal history — these are the kinds of people we serve. Our unconventional model pairs clients with fiction writers who help narrativize their essays and tell a compelling story.



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We're seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented person who can help grow the business — both behind the scenes and as a first point of contact for prospective clients. This is a multi-dimensional role. You'll need to be an exceptionally strong communicator who can engage flawlessly with a wide range of educated clients, while also managing records, setting up payment plans, onboarding new clients, and keeping our documents organized.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO

You're the first point of contact for anyone that enters our funnel, but you're also the one who keeps the business running behind the scenes. Your work will include the following:



Client Intake & Rapid Response

When a potential client fills out our form or books a meeting, you respond immediately — via iMessage (using a provided iCloud account) — to confirm, welcome, and make a great first impression. Speed and warmth are absolute priorities.



Calendar Management

You'll own the founder's calendar. Booking, confirming, canceling, and rescheduling — all handled by you. If you get a call asking to move a meeting, you make it happen.



Client Liaison

You're the first point of contact for client questions, follow-ups, and general communication — including following up with clients who missed a payment or went dark. You keep things professional, friendly, and moving, and loop in the founder only when absolutely necessary.



Onboarding & Document Management

You'll manage client onboarding from start to finish: sending confidentiality agreements, tracking returned questionnaires, organizing client files, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.



Operations & Business Improvement

During downtime, you won't just wait — you'll think. How can we better organize clients? Streamline payment tracking? Flag missed payments or unresponsive leads? You'll proactively bring ideas and help build systems that make the business run smoother.



---



WHAT YOU'LL NEED

• Bachelor's degree (strongly preferred)

• Exceptional written and spoken English — clear, warm, and professional

• Flawless grammar in
s and messages

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

• Comfort with Apple products (iMessage, iCloud, etc.)

• Experience with Slack, Google Calendar, and Google Drive

• Background in admin, customer service, or operations preferred

• A self-starter mentality — you take initiative without being told



---



WHAT WE OFFER

title: REMOTE OPERATIONS MANAGER

You will play a key role in maintaining the integrity and efficiency of the platform, ensuring that every user experience feels polished, responsive, and effortless.



This position will begin part-time, with strong potential to grow alongside the company.



WHAT YOU’LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR



You will support the operational backbone of the platform, including:



Overseeing onboarding and ensuring profiles are fully completed, polished, and approved

Monitoring platform activity to ensure bookings, payments, and messaging are functioning properly

Providing timely, thoughtful customer support across users

Identifying gaps, friction points, or inefficiencies within the platform experience

Helping implement and maintain systems and automations that improve workflow and communication

Supporting overall day-to-day operations to ensure a seamless, elevated user experience



WHO YOU ARE



You are not just an assistant—you are a systems thinker who anticipates needs before they arise.

BONUS IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH



Marketplace or platform-based businesses

Customer support systems or CRM tools

Automation tools (Zapier, Make, etc.)

Light operations or startup environments



COMPENSATION



Competitive hourly rate based on experience

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling, modern brand



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



This is not a task-based VA role. You will be a trusted operational partner helping to build and refine the foundation of a high-growth platform. Your work will directly impact the experience of every user interacting with the business.

title: Xero Bookkeeper for Australian E-commerce Brand (Daily Reconciliation)
description:
Job Title: Xero Bookkeeper for Australian E-commerce Brand (Daily Reconciliation)



ABOUT US



We're La Haute - An Australian menswear e-commerce brand based in Adelaide. We're a small, tight team doing $3.5M+ in annual revenue and growing fast. We ship orders the same day, reply to customers within minutes, and pride ourselves on running a sharp, well-organised business. We're looking a commited partner to join our team ad improve our bookkeeping,



THE ROLE



We need a Xero-certified bookkeeper to reconcile our accounts every single working day. Our current accountant is 2 weeks behind every month, and that's not good enough for us anymore. We want our numbers current, accurate, and ready to review every morning so we can make fast, confident decisions.



This is a long-term, ongoing role - not a one-off project. If you're great, you'll be with us for years.



OUR STACK



- Accounting: Xero (rules mostly set up)

- Ecommerce: Shopify (Australian + international sales)

- Banking: Commbank (AUD), AMEX, Airwallex (multi-currency, international)

- Payment gateways: Shopify Payments, and others

- You'll work alongside our registered Australian tax agent who handles BAS and year-end



WHAT YOU'LL DO DAILY



- Reconcile all bank accounts in Xero (Commbank, AMEX, Airwallex)

- Reconcile Shopify payouts and all payment gateway transactions

- Handle multi-currency transactions and FX through Airwallex

- Categorise all transactions using our existing Xero rules and written SOP

- Flag any unusual transactions or exceptions to the founders — never guess, always flag

- Deliver a daily "recs complete" notification 

- Month-end close checklist completed by day 2 of the following month



WHAT YOU'LL DO WEEKLY / MONTHLY



- Reconcile inventory and COGS entries

- Monthly P&L review with notes on anything unusual

- Provide clean, reviewed data to our Australian tax agent for quarterly BAS and year-end



IMPORTANT  -  WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT



To be clear - you are not responsible for BAS lodgement, tax returns, GST advice, or compliance decisions. 

Those sit with our registered Australian tax agent. Your job is accurate, timely reconciliation and flagging anything unusual. 

If you're ever unsure about how to treat a transaction, you flag it - you don't guess.



MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS



- Xero certification (please include your certification number in your application)

- Experience with Australian GST treatment (even though BAS is handled by our tax agent)

- Minimum 2 years bookkeeping experience for australia e-commerce businesses

- Hands-on experience reconciling Shopify and multi-currency accounts (Airwallex or Wise experience highly preferred)

- Strong written English - you'll communicate directly with the founders

- Reliable internet and a professional work setup

- Attention to detail is non-negotiable - we will notice mistakes



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with AMEX corporate card reconciliation

- Experience with Meta Ads, Google Ads, or Klaviyo billing reconciliation



HOURS & PAY



- Roughly 1 hour per day, Monday to Friday. IF more hours are required we can discuss

- Potential to grow into more hours as we expand

- Annual performance review with pay increases for strong performers



HOW TO APPLY



Please send:



1. A short cover letter telling us why this role suits you specifically (not a generic one). Start your message with the word "SHARP" so we know you read the full post.

2. Your CV / resume

3. Your Xero certification details and number

4. Your rate expectation in AUD per hour

5. An example of an Australia brand you have worked with.



HIRING PROCESS



1. Application review (by end of this week)

2. Video interview with Earl (co-founder)

3. We will sent you a short task

4. 2-week paid trial period

5. Long-term engagement



We're looking to hire within the next 2 weeks. If this sounds like the right fit for you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Content Creator with Adobe & GHL skills
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Content Creator and Digital Marketing VA to support our growing UK-based marketing and consultancy agency. This is a multifaceted role requiring a blend of technical high-end visual content creation, CRM management, and administrative excellence.



ESSENTIAL SKILLS - Please do not apply if you do not match these specific criteria:

# English Proficiency: An excellent, provable C1 / C2 level of English. This must be a formal certification (e.g., IELTS, Cambridge, TOEFL); we cannot accept results from free online quizzes.

# GoHighLevel (GHL): Minimum 6 months of experience. You must be proficient in automations, sites, funnels, and general CRM management.

# Adobe Premiere Pro: Proficiency is essential. Note: You must have your own active Adobe subscription.

# Design Tools: Intermediate level in Adobe Photoshop (own subscription required) OR Canva.

# Social Media Marketing: Deep knowledge of best practices and trends for LinkedIn, Instagram, and
.

# Lead Generation: Experience with tools such as LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

# Client Communication: Confident, fluent video-conferencing skills for client-facing work.

# General VA Skills: High-level organizational skills and reliability.



DESIRABLE SKILLS - These are considered a bonus only if ALL essential skills are met:

ROLE DETAILS & REQUIREMENTS

# Hours: Starting at 10 hours per week, with the intention of moving to a full-time position for the right candidate.

# Assessment: Please note there is a live skills assessment as part of the interview process.

# Verification: You will be required to provide proof of your English certification.



Who we are looking for:

We are a friendly and flexible agency, but we move fast. We need someone dependable, communicative, and ready to take ownership of content and systems.



STRICT REQUIREMENT: Do not apply if you have less than 6 months of GoHighLevel experience or if you do not hold a formal C1/C2 English certification.

title: [URGENT] Social Media Marketing Machine & Video Editor (High Pay)
description:
The Goal: We Need to Scale This Agency (I am looking to hire someone immediately)



My name is Shah. READ THIS ENTIRE DESCRIPTION CAREFULLY PLEASE. IF YOU FAIL AT ANY STEP THAT I ASK YOU TO COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION WILL IMMEDIATELY BE REJECTED.



I own a marketing agency that helps Body Shop (Collision Repair) owners in the US get more customers to their body shops. HOWEVER, you are NOT going to be making videos for my clients (the body shops), you are going to be making videos for my marketing agency to help me get MORE clients (body shop owners).



I’m looking for a person who can help me turn this business into a content powerhouse that attracts body shop owners across the USA to contact me to inquire about having me handle their lead generation (bring more customers to their body shop). I record a lot of raw video content on my iPhone every week (15–20 short 2 or 3 minute videos every week). I need someone who can take my raw thoughts and turn them into videos that make people stop scrolling, stay watching, and eventually BUY my services.



If you are just a "basic editor," do not apply. I need a Marketing GENIUS. You need to understand the psychology of what makes a body shop owner watch, share, and trust our marketing agency.



STOP: READ THIS OR BE DELETED

To prove you are a real person who pays attention to detail, you MUST do these 3 things in your application:



Your subject line must be: "I am the Marketing Agency Content Master for this position!"



Your first sentence must answer this: What is the difference between a Body Shop and a Mechanical Shop? (Keep it to 1 sentence).



Somewhere in your message, you must use the word "EXCLUSIVITY" in all capital letters.



If you miss even one of these, I will delete your application instantly.



What You Will Be Doing Every Day



1. Heavy Video Editing (The Main Focus)

You must be an expert at video editing. No beginners. You need to take my raw iPhone clips and make them look like professional, high-energy "Influencer" content.



The Style: Fast cuts, no dead air, great music (no copyright issues), and text hooks.



Captions: You must add subtitles that are easy to read and engaging.



Text Hooks: You need to put a big headline at the start of every video that makes a Body Shop owner stop scrolling.



2. Multi-Platform Posting

You will take the same video and post it across all these channels:



TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
 Reels: (Short, punchy videos).



YouTube Shorts: (Under 60 seconds).



LinkedIn: (Posted with a professional caption).



YouTube (Long-Form): Every now and then, I’ll send you longer 16:9 videos (client meetings or testimonials) to edit for my main YouTube channel.



3. Being a "Marketing Mind"

You aren't just clicking buttons. You are thinking: "Will a Body Shop owner in a big city care about this?" You need to know how to write captions and headlines that make people want to work with us.



4. The Weekly Newsletter

Once a week, you will take the best content from my social media and turn it into a simple, plain-text
. It should look like I typed it out myself to a friend. You’ll include a link to the video and tell them why they should watch it.



5. Managing the Inbox (Acting as Shah)

When people comment or message the pages, you will respond as me. You need to be a people person. You will talk to them, be helpful, and send them the link to book a meeting on my calendar so I can close the sale.



The Person I Am Looking For:

A Content Pro: If you have worked for a social media influencer before and you are used to "clipping" content fast, this is the job for you.



Detailed & Organized: You will manage a Google Drive. You’ll have folders for "Raw," "Edited," and "Posted." You’ll follow a strict checklist every day.



A Finisher: You work fast. You have a sense of urgency. You send me a report every evening showing exactly what you posted and which leads you talked to.



A Marketing Genius: You understand that our goal is to convince Body Shop owners across the US that we are the only company they should trust with their marketing.



Work Hours & Pay: JOB IS FULL TIME, IF YOU CANNOT WORK ON US PST THEN PLEASE DO NOT APPLY.



Schedule: Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM PST.



Full-Time: This is a dedicated role. I need your full attention.



The Pay: I pay very handsomely for this role because I expect the best work in the world. If you help me scale, you will be rewarded.



How to Apply (The Portfolio is Key):

I will not hire you without seeing your work.



Send me a link to a Google Drive folder with at least 10 videos you have edited (Short-form Reels/TikToks with captions).



MAKE ME A VIDEO OF YOU TELLING ME WHY I SHOULD PICK YOU (IF THERE IS NO VIDEO OF YOU TALKING AND TELLING ME WHY I SHOULD PICK YOU THEN I WILL NOT RESPOND TO YOUR APPLICATION): Tell me things like your experience. Have you ever worked with an influencer or a marketing agency before? How can I trust that you are going to be great at video editing?



Confirm you can work the 8 AM - 6 PM PST shift.



I am looking for a teammate to help my brand be show in front of hundreds of thousands of people. If that’s you, apply now.

— Shah

• Troubleshoot and maintain existing GHL setups



 WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

• Proven, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (portfolio or examples required)

• Strong understanding of marketing automation and CRM best practices

• Ability to work full-time during PST business hours

• Detail-oriented, reliable, and proactive communicator

• Experience with Zapier, webhooks, or third-party integrations is a plus



WHAT YOU'LL GET:

• Stable, long-term full-time work

• $4–$5/hour depending on experience

• Bi-weekly salary paid via Wise

• 100% remote — work from anywhere

• Supportive, fast-moving team environment



—

Please submit your application through this form:

title: Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist (Remote)
description:
***MUST SUBMIT DISC SCORES AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED***

We are hiring an Inbound Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist to handle warm inbound homeowner leads from people actively searching online to sell their homes.



This role exists to filter, qualify, or disqualify leads before they ever reach our acquisition team.



This is not sales, not cold calling, and not persuasion.



If you are comfortable asking direct questions, enforcing clear criteria, and ending calls professionally when a lead is not a fit, this role may be right for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



Respond to warm inbound homeowner inquiries (no cold calling)



Conduct structured qualification calls using a clear scorecard



Ask direct questions about:



motivation



timeline



property condition



decision-maker status



price expectations



Apply qualification rules consistently



Disqualify early when criteria are not met (this is considered success)



Transfer only clean, well-qualified opportunities to acquisitions



Document outcomes clearly in the CRM



You are evaluated on decision quality and discipline, not call volume.



Work Schedule & Availability (Important)



This role requires full-day availability, not just total hours.



Typical schedule:



4–5 hours work



2-hour break



4–5 hours work



Leads come in throughout the day and require timely follow-up.



This role is not suitable if you need a fragmented or flexible schedule.



Who This Role Is For



You may be a strong fit if you:



Are comfortable asking direct questions



Can say “no” calmly and professionally



Prefer clear rules over improvisation



Stay emotionally steady on calls



Document accurately and follow SOPs



Work well independently in a remote environment



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is likely not a fit if you:



Are looking for a sales or commission-heavy role



Prefer persuasion over qualification



Dislike enforcing rules



Want flexibility instead of structure



Feel uncomfortable disqualifying friendly sellers



Preferred DISC Tendencies (Not Required, but Helpful)



Moderate Dominance (comfortable leading conversations)



Low–moderate Influence (professional, not sales-driven)



Moderate Steadiness (calm, patient)



Moderate Compliance (respects rules and processes)



High-pressure sales personalities are not a fit.



What We Offer



100% remote role



Consistent warm inbound leads



Clear SOPs, scorecards, and expectations



Stable, long-term opportunity for the right fit



Professional, process-driven team environment



How to Apply



Please include a short answer to this question with your application:



“When would you disqualify a seller who sounds friendly but does not meet your criteria?”



Final Note

title: Facebook Ads Manager (Meta Ads) Part-Time | Remote | Long-Term

 / Meta Ads

 with the following:

title: Real Estate Appraisal Research Assistant (2+ Years Experience Required)
description:
Do not apply without prior experience supporting real estate appraisals.



We are hiring a Real Estate Appraisal Research Assistant to help collect, verify, and organize data used in commercial appraisal reports. This role requires someone who already understands appraisal terminology, comparable sales research, and property data verification.



Responsibilities

Research property transaction history and comparable sales (comps)

Compile market data used in real estate appraisal reports

Call brokers, property owners, and market participants to verify sale details

Review and interpret plat maps and basic property records

Organize and maintain clean datasets in Excel

Contact ownership to verify and categorize operating expenses for income properties

Assist in compiling data tables used in appraisal reports



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

2+ years experience supporting real estate appraisals

Ability to read and understand plat maps and basic property records

Familiarity with appraisal terminology (comps, cap rate, NOI, expense ratios, etc.)

Strong Excel skills (sorting, filtering, basic formulas, maintaining clean datasets)

Basic accounting understanding (profit & loss categories / operating expenses)

High attention to detail and ability to verify data accuracy

Available to work during PST business hours



To Apply (Required)

Submit the following:

Resume with relevant appraisal or real estate research experience

30-second MP3 voice introduction

References from a previous real estate or appraisal employer



Short answer: Describe your experience working with comparable sales or appraisal reports



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Assistant (Part-Time to Full-Time Growth Role)
description:
We're not just looking for someone to check off tasks. We're looking for someone to grow with us.

Gray Operations is a dynamic company that values sharp minds, strong communication, and people who take pride in their work. We're hiring a Virtual Assistant who starts part-time but has a clear path to a full-time role as we expand. If you're the kind of person who notices the details others miss, speaks up with good ideas, and takes ownership of their work, we want to hear from you.

What You'll Be Doing:



Supporting daily operations including scheduling, correspondence, and task management

Managing and updating records in Zoho CRM

Communicating professionally with clients and tea
mbers via
 and messaging platforms

Organizing files, documents, and workflows to keep things running smoothly

Proactively flagging issues and suggesting improvements. Your input matters here.



What We're Looking For:



Excellent written and spoken English, clear, professional, and confident

Strong attention to detail. You catch errors before they become problems.

Experience with Zoho CRM (or similar CRM tools) is a big plus

Self-starter who doesn't wait to be told what to do next

Someone who's genuinely excited to contribute ideas, not just complete tasks

Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional work environment

A long-term mindset. We invest in people who invest in us.



What You Can Expect From Us:



A supportive team that listens to your ideas

Clear communication and consistent feedback

A real opportunity to grow into a full-time position as the company scales

A workplace culture built on trust and results



How to Apply:

Please include a short intro about yourself, your experience with Zoho or similar tools, and one example of a time you caught a mistake or improved a process at work. Applications without this will not be considered. Attention to detail starts here!

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Homeowner Solutions NY (HSNY) is expanding and seeking high-performing Outreach Specialists who are motivated by results, personal growth, and meaningful work. This role is ideal for individuals with a sales mindset who want to earn well while making a real difference in homeowners’ lives.



As an Outreach Specialist, you will be the first voice homeowners hear when seeking clarity around foreclosure or property distress. Your ability to build rapport, ask the right questions, and guide conversations will directly impact both client outcomes and your earning potential.



This is a consultative/appointment setting role—focused on delivering relevant information, trust, and opportunity, not pressure.



Scope of work

- Make outbound calls/texts to homeowner and inbound leads.

- Verify property ownership, occupancy status and motivation level

- Ask structured questions to understand: mortgage status/hardship, timeline urgency, property condition, decision makers involved.

- Introduce the company's services and solutions clearly and professionally 

- Tag and categorize leads in CRM based on quality

- Enter detailed notes after every call, update lead stages and contact information.

title: Accounting  Specialist
description:
Accounting Specialist



Sacramento Managing Company is seeking a detail-oriented Accounting Specialist to support day-to-day accounting operations, financial reporting, and accounts receivable functions. The ideal candidate will have experience working with QuickBooks, strong knowledge of accounting principles, and previous exposure to the trucking / transportation industry.



This position reports directly to the Head of Finance.



Key Responsibilities:



Maintain and update accounting records in QuickBooks for one or multiple entities.



Assist with bank, credit card, and general ledger reconciliations.



Prepare basic financial reports and support month-end closing activities.



Support accounts receivable processes, including invoicing and follow-up on outstanding balances.



Work with trucking-related financial data such as loads, invoices, settlements, and carrier payments.



Assist with payroll, expense tracking, and tax-related documentation.



Ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance with company accounting standards.



Collaborate with the finance team and other departments as needed.



Requirements:



1–3+ years of experience in accounting or bookkeeping.



Experience working with QuickBooks Online and/or Desktop.



Experience in trucking / transportation accounting or logistics is strongly preferred.



Understanding of basic accounting principles and reconciliations.



Proficiency in Microsoft Excel.



Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.



Ability to communicate clearly and work in a team environment.



Experience working with U.S.-based companies and accounting standards is a plus.



If you are looking to grow your accounting career in a dynamic transportation environment, we encourage you to apply.

title: Call Handling Assistant for US Law Firm
description:
Title: Office Assistant Wanted - Call handling for inbound and outbound calls, Transcription, Legal work, Admin duties, Any Other Tasks Needed

 

You will be doing a variety of tasks, all of which we will provide tutorials for you.



The primary task for these positions will be inbound and outbound call handling. 

- A high energy, professional, people-person who will handle at least 50 inbound and outbound calls per day.

- You must have a warm personality and like to talk to people on the phone. Connecting and building a relationship with potential leads is key to success in this position.

- You will take warm inbound calls from prospective criminal defense clients, follow the scripting process we have laid out, and schedule them for a consultation with our office.

- You will also be responsible for making outbound follow up calls to “warm” leads.

- This is not “strong” selling. This is relationship building. No cold calling.

- You will handle incoming calls from Current Clients and court personnel, transferring to the respective office tea
mbers. 

- You must be able to talk and type at the same time, as well as making detailed notes.



Other tasks that we see this position handling, as needed: 

- Document preparation and delivery to Legal Support staff in office

- Call review

- Schedule assessment to deliver organized outline to Attorneys and Legal Support staff in office



ABOUT YOU:

Excellent Customer Service skills with great communication skills. 

Be able to manage tasks independently.

Ability to follow detailed processes and call intake scripting.

Great attitude and teamwork mentality.

Very organized and high-level attention to detail.

Hardworking and likable since you will be working closely with Potential New Clients, Current Clients, and other tea
mbers.

 

Pay Rate: To Be Determined - this will depend on your level of skill and other people that apply to the job.

 

I am looking for 3-5 full-time employees, who may have fluctuating schedules to ensure phone call coverage.

 

Perks:

* As we are looking for multiple tea
mbers, the structure of scheduling could mean long lunches, short week days with weekend scheduling, and/or late morning start times. 

* Flexible Vacation, if you need time off just let me know.

* Opportunity to advance/get bonuses, if you do a good job I will give you a raise and bonuses.

* 13th month bonus - you will get an extra month’s pay at the end of the year, which will be prorated depending on how long you have been with me

 

About Me:

We are a criminal defense firm with multiple offices statewide. We focus heavily on client success and serving customers right. Your duties will involve both of these.

 

To Apply for the job:



1. 
 me at 

2.  Change the subject line to "I Want to Work for You [Insert my name here] - Call Handling VA"

3.  Go to https://www.speedtest.net and take a screenshot of your results and attach it to
.

4.  At the top of your message, record a 2-3 minute video and
/share it with me of you answering the following questions. 

A.  Why do you want this job?

B.  What are your hobbies and interests?

C.  What are your other commitments?

D.  What are you looking for in a position right now?

E.  How many hours are you looking to work?



5. Write to acknowledge "I understand that I will be primarily handling incoming calls and making outbound calls so I will ensure a quiet, distraction free work environment during scheduled shifts". 

 

Make sure to follow all the steps above.  This is a great job opportunity with the ability to get bonuses and raises, so I will only look at applicants that really want the job. 

 

Do not write more than what I have asked you above as attention to detail and following instruction are essential functions of these positions. 

 

Thank you,

Nichole Leiser

title: Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager
description:
Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager



Company: NEXTGEN AV + Fruitbowl Events

Location: Melbourne (Hybrid) or Remote

Type: Full-Time or Part-Time (Flexible for the right candidate)



About Us



At NEXTGEN, we deliver technical, creative, high-performance event production — from corporate conferences to large-scale brand activations.



At Fruitbowl, we design and manage end-to-end event experiences — strategy, planning, and execution.



Together, we don’t just run events — we build experiences that connect, engage, and perform.



Now we’re looking for someone to bring that same energy to our digital presence and marketing engine.



The Role



We’re looking for a Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager to take ownership of our online presence across both brands.



This role is part content strategist, part campaign manager, and part growth driver.



Your job is simple:

Turn our work, our projects, and our expertise into consistent inbound enquiries and brand authority.



Key Responsibilities

Social Media Strategy & Execution

Plan and execute content across LinkedIn,
, and Instagram

Develop a consistent posting schedule across both brands

Create high-quality, on-brand content (posts, reels, short-form video)

Content Creation & Storytelling

Capture and repurpose content from live events

Work with our team to showcase projects, behind-the-scenes, and client outcomes

Write compelling captions aligned with a premium, agency-style tone

Campaigns & Lead Generation

Plan and execute paid and organic campaigns

Drive targeted inbound enquiries for corporate events, government and community events, and brand activations

Build and optimise campaigns across Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads

Digital Marketing & Automation

Support
 marketing campaigns and automation

Work alongside CRM systems such as HubSpot

Assist with website updates, landing pages, and lead funnels

Reporting & Optimisation

Track performance across campaigns and platforms

Report on engagement, reach, and leads generated

Continuously improve content and campaign performance

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience in social media and digital marketing

Strong understanding of content strategy and audience targeting

Ability to create polished, high-end content (visual and written)

Experience running paid campaigns that generate leads

Comfortable working across multiple brands and projects

Strong organisational and communication skills

Bonus (Highly Valued)

Experience in events, production, or agency environments

Video editing skills (Reels / short-form content)

Photography or on-site content capture experience

Understanding of B2B marketing and lead generation

What Success Looks Like

Consistent, high-quality content across both brands

Increased inbound enquiries through social and campaigns

Strong brand positioning in the Melbourne events market

Social channels that reflect the quality of our work

Why Join Us

Work across two dynamic and growing brands

Be part of high-profile events and activations

Creative freedom with real impact on business growth

Flexible working environment

How to Apply



Please include:



Examples of social media accounts or campaigns you’ve managed

A short explanation of how you would generate leads for an events company

Your availability and salary expectations

Final Word



We’re not looking for someone to just “post content.”



We’re looking for someone who can turn attention into opportunity.

title: E-Commerce Listing & Cross-Listing Virtual Assistant for eBay, Vendoo, and SellRaze
description:
I am looking for a reliable and detail-oriented virtual assistant to help with product listing and cross-listing for a resale and e-commerce business.



Your job will include:



editing and organizing product photos

uploading photos into SellRaze

posting listings in SellRaze using the descriptions and pricing I provide

cross-listing items from Vendoo to other platforms

making sure titles, descriptions, pricing, categories, and item specifics are accurate

checking that the correct photos match the correct item

updating or fixing listings when needed

helping keep inventory and listings organized

 Marketplace, Grailed, Vinted, and other resale marketplaces.



You must be highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to follow instructions carefully. Experience with eBay, Vendoo, SellRaze, resale listings, cross-listing tools, and basic photo editing is strongly preferred.

To apply, answer these questions:

3. Have you done photo editing for listings?

4. How many listings can you complete in one hour?

5. What is your hourly rate?

6. Are you available for a paid trial task?

 Put the words DETAIL MATTERS at the top of your application.

title: Content & Video Editing VA
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



We are hiring a Content & Video Editing VA to support short-form video content (TikTok, Instagram Reels) and future long-form content.



This is an execution-based role. You will not be responsible for content strategy or idea generation.



You will work from:



Pre-recorded talking-head videos



Provided scripts



Clear editing and posting instructions



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Video Editing (Light Editing Only)



Clean jump cuts



Smooth transitions (no choppy edits)



Remove long pauses, mistakes, filler words



Add minimal on-screen text when specified



Content Preparation & Posting



Upload and schedule/post content on TikTok and Instagram



Use Metricool (or similar tools) to schedule and publish content



Follow provided captions and posting instructions exactly



Ensure formatting matches platform standards



File Management



Upload edited videos to correct Google Drive folders



Name files according to provided naming conventions



Mark tasks complete in tracking documents



REQUIRED SKILLS



Experience editing short-form vertical video (TikTok, Instagram Reels)



Proficiency in CapCut and/or Canva



Experience using Metricool (or similar scheduling tools)



Strong familiarity with Google Workspace (Docs, Drive, Sheets)



Strong attention to pacing, flow, and clean editing



Ability to follow instructions exactly (very important)



Preferred (but not required):



Familiarity with using AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT or similar) to assist with captions, formatting, or basic content support



QUALITY STANDARD (VERY IMPORTANT)



Edits must:



Feel smooth and natural



Not distract from the speaker



Match provided examples exactly



Revisions due to missed instructions or poor execution are not billable.

title: Content Strategist & Script Writer for Day1 Agency (NYC Based Social Media Agency)
description:
Day1 Agency is a NYC based social media and content agency producing viral short form video content for a growing roster of US brands across lifestyle, health, food, and service industries. Our content has generated hundreds of millions of views across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and
. You can see our work at 



We are looking for a Content Strategist and Script Writer who can own the creative and strategic layer of our content production. This is not a task execution role. This is a role for someone who thinks deeply about what makes content work, stays on top of trends before anyone else, and can write scripts that stop scrollers in the first 3 seconds. You will own script drafting, trend research, creative ideation, content calendars, and post production briefs for our in house editor. You will work directly with the founder and the broader team.



Core responsibilities:



Write scripts for short form video content across multiple client brands (target 15 to 25 scripts per week)

Research and identify trends on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts that are relevant to each client

Build weekly and monthly content calendars for each client

Develop creative concepts and series ideas that can become repeatable content formats

Write post production briefs for the editor so edits align with the intended creative vision

Analyze competitor content and surface insights we can apply to our work

Stay deeply plugged into US culture, internet humor, and platform specific trends



Core skills we are looking for:



Proven experience writing short form video scripts that have performed well

Deep understanding of US based audience behavior, cultural references, and platform algorithms

Strong research skills and ability to quickly learn new industries and brand voices

Experience working in a social media or content agency is a significant plus

Excellent written English



Key traits we are looking for:



Proactive and self driven (this is the single most important trait)

Brings ideas to the team without being asked

Takes ownership of projects rather than waiting for instructions

Flexible and adaptable across different brands and creative styles

Has strong opinions about what makes content work



Rate and hours:

Rate: $12 to $15 per hour USD depending on experience

Hours: 15 to 20 hours per week to start, with room to grow

EST working hours preferred for team collaboration, though we are flexible on the execution work



How to apply:

Before applying, please take 5 minutes to look at our work at day1.agency so you understand the kind of content we create.

In your application, please include the following three things:



A brief paragraph about your experience writing short form video scripts, including the types of brands or content you have worked on.

Three content ideas for a laundry pickup app targeting Gen Z in NYC. These should be specific enough to actually produce, not generic concepts. Include the hook, the premise, and why you think it would work.

A link to one short form video (TikTok, Reel, or Short) that you think is brilliant, and explain in two sentences why it works.



Applications that do not include all three items will not be reviewed. We are specifically looking for people who follow instructions and bring thoughtful work to the table from the first touchpoint.

We look forward to hearing from you.

title: iCIMS and AI Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
A U.S.-based placement agency serving affluent families, executives, and high-profile clients worldwide is seeking an exceptionally sharp, detail-oriented AI Systems & Automation Specialist with deep iCIMS experience to support the evolution of our backend infrastructure.



This is a unique opportunity for someone who thrives behind the scenes—someone who intuitively understands systems, automation, and operational flow—and is excited to help architect a more intelligent, scalable foundation through thoughtful implementation of iCIMS and its AI-driven capabilities, including Coalesce AI, Digital Assistant, and TextRecruit Everywhere.



The role will begin part-time, with strong potential to evolve into a long-term, full-time position for the right fit.



WHAT YOU’LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR



You will play a key role in refining and elevating our internal systems—bringing greater efficiency, cohesion, and automation across both candidate and client pipelines.



This includes working within iCIMS and alongside integrated tools to thoughtfully implement workflows that enhance communication, streamline processes, and reduce manual touchpoints—while ensuring a seamless, high-touch experience remains intact.



You’ll help identify opportunities for smarter systems, support implementation of automation and AI-driven workflows, and guide our internal team in effectively leveraging the full capabilities of the platform.



WHO YOU ARE



You are a systems thinker first and foremost—someone who sees the bigger picture and understands how all moving parts connect.



You are someone who:

Has hands-on experience working within iCIMS (required)

Understands how to integrate and implement automation tools and AI into business operations

Thinks in terms of structure, flow, and long-term scalability

Is highly detail-oriented and organized

Communicates clearly, proactively, and with intention

Takes ownership and executes with precision

Is energized by building and refining systems that drive real impact



BONUS IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH



Recruitment or staffing environments

ATS/CRM optimization

Workflow automation tools (Zapier, Make, etc.)

SMS automation platforms

Reporting and data visibility

Process documentation and SOP development



COMPENSATION



Competitive hourly rate based on experience

Opportunity for long-term growth into a full-time role

Performance-based increases tied to successful implementation and impact



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



This is not a task-based role. You will be treated as a strategic partner—someone trusted to help shape and elevate the operational backbone of a premium, service-driven brand. Your work will directly influence efficiency, scalability, and overall growth.

title: PHONE EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT (Sales Focused) [REMOTE]
description:
YOU (THE CANDIDATE):

You are the kind of woman who treats your work like it's your business. You thrive in a role where communication, intelligence, and quick thinking matter every single day. You excel at verbal communication in English, think quickly under pressure (including in an interview), and you have a natural sales mentality — you feel confident encouraging tenants to sign or renew a lease without needing scripts or hand-holding, even if you are new to property management. You are thrilled by the idea of a lifetime job opportunity instead of applying for 100 new jobs every 6 months. 



Read these carefully - if this sounds like you, you’re who we want:

• You have a proven history of staying with past employers (ideally 2 years or more).

title: Digital Marketing Specialist — Meta Ads, Google Ads & Klaviyo for Sydney Dental Practice
description:
Job Description

We're a design-led dental practice based in Sydney, Australia, looking for an experienced digital marketing specialist to manage paid advertising and
 marketing.

The Practice



Premium dental practice in inner Sydney

Design-conscious brand (think Aesop meets dentistry)

Primary service focus: Invisalign, cosmetic dentistry, hygiene

Current monthly Meta spend: ~$3,200 AUD

Current monthly Google Ads spend: ~$650 AUD (scaling)

Klaviyo list: ~2,500 profiles



Phase 2 Opportunity: Once the primary practice campaigns are running smoothly (3-6 months), we'll expand to a second suburban practice with additional Meta lead generation for Invisalign and cosmetic services. This will increase scope and budget accordingly.



What You'll Be Doing



Meta Ads 
/Instagram)



Manage lead generation campaigns (currently one warm audience campaign performing well)

Create and test new ad variations — we need creative diversity (currently one ad carrying 86% of leads)

Optimise for cost-per-lead and lead quality

Build cold audiences and lookalikes to reduce warm audience fatigue

Monthly spend management: ~$3,200 AUD



Google Ads



Manage search campaigns targeting high-intent dental keywords (Invisalign, teeth whitening, etc.)

Keyword research, bid management, negative keyword refinement

Landing page recommendations for conversion optimisation (current site loads in 7.5s — we're fixing this)

Monthly spend management: ~$650 AUD (scaling to $1,500+)



Klaviyo 
 & SMS)



Build and send 2-4
 campaigns per month

Create automated flows (post-enquiry, reactivation, review request)

Segment audiences and maintain list hygiene

SMS campaigns for patient reactivation

Integration troubleshooting (we use Fresha as our booking platform)



Reporting & Communication



Weekly async updates (Slack or
)

Monthly performance summary with insights and recommendations

Fortnightly video call (30 min) for strategy alignment





Ideal Candidate



Required Experience:

3+ years managing Meta Ads with lead generation objectives

Proven Google Ads experience (Search campaigns, not just Display)

Hands-on Klaviyo experience (campaigns AND flows — show me flows you've built)

Strong written English for ad copy and
 content

Experience with healthcare, dental, or wellness brands is a strong plus



Technical Skills:

Meta Business Suite / Ads Manager

Google Ads (Search, Performance Max)

Klaviyo (campaigns, flows, segmentation)

Google Analytics 4 (basic)

Familiarity with 
 or Zapier (helpful, not required)



Work Style:

Proactive communicator — you flag issues before they become problems

Detail-oriented — our brand is premium and errors are visible

Self-directed — you propose improvements, not just execute tasks

Available during Australian business hours for urgent matters (within reason)





What We Provide

Brand guidelines and creative assets (we have a strong visual identity)

Access to all ad accounts and Klaviyo

Clear briefs and responsive feedback

Long-term engagement for the right person — this isn't a one-off project

Expansion opportunity with a second practice in 3-6 months





Budget & Engagement

Monthly Retainer: $1,800-2,000 AUD/month (~$1,150-1,300 USD)

Hours: Estimated 12-18 hours/week

Contract Type: Ongoing monthly retainer with 30-day notice period

Start Date: May 2026



To Apply

Please include:

1. A brief introduction

Who you are, where you're based, and why this role suits you.



2. Portfolio evidence (required)

Share at least ONE of the following:



Screenshots fro
ta Ads Manager showing a campaign you managed (CPL, spend, results — client details can be redacted)

Before/after metrics for an account you optimised

Klaviyo flow screenshots showing sequences you've built



If you claim you can't share anything due to NDAs, that's a red flag. You should have at least one example you can share.



3. Specific experience



Tell me about:



Your best CPL achieved for a lead generation campaign (and what industry)

A Google Ads campaign you optimised — what was the problem and what did you do?

A Klaviyo flow you built from scratch — what was the trigger and sequence?



4. Healthcare/dental experience

If you've worked with dentists, chiropractors, physios, med spas, or similar, tell me about it. Not required, but a strong plus.



5. Availability

Hours per week you can commit

Your timezone and typical working hours

How you handle urgent issues outside those hours



6. One question for me

Ask me something about this role that would help you d
 if it's a good fit.



Our Hiring Process



Step 1: Application Review (1 week)

We'll review all applications and shortlist based on portfolio evidence and relevant experience.

Step 2: Loom Video Request (shortlisted candidates)

We'll ask you to record a 5-minute Loom walking through a Meta campaign you managed — what you optimised and why.

Step 3: Video Interview (20-30 min)

Quick call to discuss your experience, working style, and answer questions.

Step 4: Paid Trial Task ($100 AUD)

We'll give you view-only access to our Meta Ads Manager and ask you to:



Audit the current account

Provide 5-10 specific recommendations with rationale

Submit a short written report



This helps us see how you think, not just what you claim.



Step 5: Decision & Onboarding

If the trial goes well, we'll start with a 30-day probation period before confirming ongoing engagement.



What Success Looks Like



Month 1-3:



Take over Meta, Google Ads, and Klaviyo from current agency

Maintain or improve current Meta CPL ($27 — already strong)

Improve Google Ads conversion rate (currently 1.81%, target 5%+)

title: Fashion Editor (Luxury & Korean Trends) | 13th Month | Paid Vacation Days
description:
A leading U.S.-based lifestyle and shopping platform for Korean-American women is seeking a Fashion Editor with exceptional taste and a refined understanding of luxury and trend-forward fashion.



Our platform showcases curated fashion, beauty, and lifestyle selections that inspire a sophisticated, global audience.

You will be responsible for selecting, curating, and writing about products that resonate with our readers — from trending K-style pieces to iconic luxury brands.





Responsibilities

• Curate and select fashion products from luxury and trending brands

• Write short, engaging posts that highlight what’s stylish and relevant

• Research and analyze current fashion and beauty trends

• Collaborate with the content and design team to create visually appealing posts

• Help define the brand’s fashion and lifestyle editorial voice for our growing audience





Qualifications

• Strong sense of fashion, trends, and aesthetics

• Familiarity with top global and Korean-favorite brands (Chanel, Dior, Loewe, Prada, etc.)

• Experience in fashion writing, editing, styling, or merchandising preferred

• Fashion or Design degree a plus (not required if you have strong experience or taste)

• Excellent written English and ability to write concise, engaging copy

• Basic understanding of online publishing or CMS platforms

• Photoshop, Canva, or image editing skills a plus





Hours of Work, Pay, and Employee Benefits

• Competitive pay based on experience and performance

• Bi-weekly pay via bank transfer

• Performance-based bonuses

• 13th Month Pay

• 12 Paid Vacation Days per year starting Month 7

• 5 Paid Sick Days per year

• Company-paid SSS Contribution starting Month 7





How to Apply



Please send an
 to 
 with the subject line: “[Your Full Name] – Fashion Editor Applicant”



Include your resume and answers to the questions below. Applications without completed questions will not be considered.



Application Questions

 1. Have you worked as a Fashion Editor, Writer, or Stylist before?

 2. How many hours per week can you work from Monday to Friday? (minimum and maximum)

 3. Can you work during U.S. business hours (EST)?

 4. Please describe your computer setup, internet speed, and headset (if applicable).

 5. Please provide a copy of your resume.

 6. Describe your personal fashion taste — what brands or styles do you love most and why?

 7. What are your short- and long-term career goals?

 8. What is your expected monthly salary?



Thank you for your time and interest. We look forward to reviewing your application and connecting with talented editors who share our passion for fashion, luxury, and lifestyle excellence.

title: Video Editor – Direct Response Ads + AI UGC/B-Roll Generation
description:
We’re looking for a direct-response-minded video editor who can turn raw product footage, AI-generated UGC, AI b-roll, and scripts into high-converting TikTok and Meta ads. This role is perfect for someone who already has a solid intermediate editing foundation and wants to grow into a top-tier performance editor.



You’ll work closely with our founder to study what works, learn performance frameworks, and produce ads that sell.



You will be responsible for:

• Editing short-form direct-response video ads (TikTok, Meta, Reels)

• Creating and refining AI-generated UGC using tools like Claude, Kive.ai, Arcads, or similar

• Generating AI b-roll + supplementary product shots

• Crafting fast-paced, high-retention edits that follow performance frameworks

• Syncing edits to hooks, emotional beats, and problem-solution structures

• Following creative briefs accurately

• Creating multiple variations of winning ads for scale

• Keeping up with current DTC and TikTok ad trends

• Communicating clearly in English and taking feedback well



You MUST have experience with:

• Direct response editing principles (hooks, pacing, scroll-stoppers)

• Short-form editing for paid ads (not just organic content)

• AI tools for UGC generation and b-roll creation

• CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

• Basic motion graphics, captions, overlays, and callouts

• Exporting platform-optimized ad files for TikTok + Meta



Bonus (not required but big plus):

• Understanding of creative strategy or ad testing

• Understanding of what makes an ad “convert”

• Experience working with eCommerce brands



Who we're looking for:

• Intermediate skill level

• Hungry to learn and grow

• Obsessed with improving creative performance

• Comfortable receiving and applying feedback

• Fast, reliable, and detail-oriented

• Someone who wants a long-term working relationship

title: Case Manager Assistant
description:
Now Hiring: Case Manager Assistant (Remote – Philippines)

THE INKELL FIRM

Updated: 4/22/2026



????  Pay: $5–$8 USD per hour  •  Up to 40 hours/week  •  100% Remote

 

??  Applications without an uploaded video will not be considered. Instructions below. 



About The Inkell Firm

The Inkell Firm is a personal injury law firm based in Wilmington, Delaware, USA. We represent clients in motor vehicle a
, premises liability, workers’ compensation, medical malpractice, nursing home abuse, and wrongful death cases.

We are a values-driven team and we hire based on culture first. Our five core values are Integrity & Transparency, Innovation & Excellence, Client-Centricity, Collaboration & Teamwork, and Accountability & Responsibility.

Our Philippine Team

Six of our current tea
mbers are based in the Philippines — and several of them started in this exact role. We have a strong track record of promoting Case Manager Assistants into more senior positions as they grow with the firm. We are proud of our Philippine team and are actively looking to expand it.

We value the work ethic, communication skills, and dedication we have consistently seen from our Philippine colleagues. If you are looking for a long-term opportunity with a firm that invests in its people, this is it.

The Role

This is a fully remote, full-time-eligible position supporting our pre-litigation case managers. You will help keep client cases moving by tracking deadlines, gathering records and documents, maintaining our case management system, and communicating with the team. No prior legal experience is required — we provide training on our systems and processes.

U.S. business hours are required. Strong spoken and written English is essential.

Responsibilities

• Support case setup, document gathering, and intake checklists.

• Prepare basic client communications as assigned by pre-litigation case managers.

• Flag overdue client contacts or case milestones for Intake Team review.

• Submit ER, urgent care, and treating physician record requests within 48 hours of assignment.

• Request updated PIP (Personal Injury Protection) logs every 90 days.

• Track records, bills, and medical expenses; ensure accurate entry in Filevine within 15 days of receipt.

• File records and documents properly in Filevine and Egnyte.

• Confirm records and bills are received within 45 days and uploaded to the correct Filevine fields.

• Maintain confidentiality and professionalism in all client and firm communications.

• Other tasks as assigned by attorneys and case managers.

 

Qualifications

• Fluent English required – strong written and oral communication skills are non-negotiable.

• High attention to detail with the ability to manage multiple active files simultaneously.

• Strong organizational and time-management abilities.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Outlook, Word, Excel, Teams).

• Experience with case management software; Filevine experience is a strong plus (training provided).

• Self-motivated, reliable, and comfortable working independently in a remote environment.

• Team-oriented with a positive, solutions-focused attitude.

• Maintains confidentiality and professionalism at all times.

 

Preferred Qualifications

• Prior experience in personal injury, insurance claims, or legal support.

• Familiarity with medical records, billing, and common PI treatment timelines.

• Background as an insurance adjuster or in a claims-handling role.

 

How to Apply – Video Resume Required

We want to get to know you before we meet you. All applicants must complete and submit a 3–5 minute video resume. In your video, please introduce yourself, walk us through your relevant background, and tell us why you are a strong fit for The Inkell Firm specifically.



Upload your video here: 



Please also
 your resume to

title: Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist (Remote)
description:
***MUST SUBMIT DISC SCORES AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED***

We are hiring an Inbound Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist to handle warm inbound homeowner leads from people actively searching online to sell their homes.



This role exists to filter, qualify, or disqualify leads before they ever reach our acquisition team.



This is not sales, not cold calling, and not persuasion.



If you are comfortable asking direct questions, enforcing clear criteria, and ending calls professionally when a lead is not a fit, this role may be right for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



Respond to warm inbound homeowner inquiries (no cold calling)



Conduct structured qualification calls using a clear scorecard



Ask direct questions about:



motivation



timeline



property condition



decision-maker status



price expectations



Apply qualification rules consistently



Disqualify early when criteria are not met (this is considered success)



Transfer only clean, well-qualified opportunities to acquisitions



Document outcomes clearly in the CRM



You are evaluated on decision quality and discipline, not call volume.



Work Schedule & Availability (Important)



This role requires full-day availability, not just total hours.



Typical schedule:



4–5 hours work



2-hour break



4–5 hours work



Leads come in throughout the day and require timely follow-up.



This role is not suitable if you need a fragmented or flexible schedule.



Who This Role Is For



You may be a strong fit if you:



Are comfortable asking direct questions



Can say “no” calmly and professionally



Prefer clear rules over improvisation



Stay emotionally steady on calls



Document accurately and follow SOPs



Work well independently in a remote environment



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is likely not a fit if you:



Are looking for a sales or commission-heavy role



Prefer persuasion over qualification



Dislike enforcing rules



Want flexibility instead of structure



Feel uncomfortable disqualifying friendly sellers



Preferred DISC Tendencies (Not Required, but Helpful)



Moderate Dominance (comfortable leading conversations)



Low–moderate Influence (professional, not sales-driven)



Moderate Steadiness (calm, patient)



Moderate Compliance (respects rules and processes)



High-pressure sales personalities are not a fit.



What We Offer



100% remote role



Consistent warm inbound leads



Clear SOPs, scorecards, and expectations



Stable, long-term opportunity for the right fit



Professional, process-driven team environment



How to Apply



Please include a short answer to this question with your application:



“When would you disqualify a seller who sounds friendly but does not meet your criteria?”

title: Experience Transaction Coordinator for California
description:
I am looking for an Experienced Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Transaction Coordination & Admin Support)



We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with real estate experience to support our growing team. This is a remote position ideal for candidates based overseas or in Mexico who have hands-on experience in U.S. real estate transactions.



About the Role

This position plays a critical role in keeping transactions on track from contract to close. You will be responsible for managing timelines, ensuring compliance, and supporting agents with day-to-day administrative tasks.



Key Responsibilities

- Manage real estate transactions from accepted offer to closing

- Monitor and track all contingency deadlines and removal periods

- Ensure all required documents are completed, signed, and submitted on time

- Coordinate with agents, lenders, escrow, and other parties throughout the transaction

- Maintain accurate and organized transaction files

- Provide administrative support to the team as needed



Required Experience & Skills

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate transaction coordination or similar role

- Proficiency with SkySlope, Glide, and Matrix MLS

- Strong understanding of real estate contracts, timelines, and compliance requirements

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

- High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

- Ability to manage multiple transactions at once and meet deadlines



What We’re Looking For

- Proactive problem-solver

- Dependable and able to work independently

- Strong time management and follow-through

- Comfortable in a fast-paced real estate environment



Position Details

- Remote (Overseas or Mexico-based candidates preferred)

- Flexible hours with availability during U.S. business hours (PST preferred)

- Long-term opportunity with room for growth



How to Apply

Submit your resume along with a brief summary of your real estate experience.



Also, please answer these few questions:



- Availability (Hours in PST)

- Rate experience with Matrix MLS (1–5)

- Rate experience with SkySlope (1–5)

- Rate experience with Glide (1–5)

- What CRM's are you familiar with?

title: Social Media Marketing VA
description:
Social Media Marketing VA (Full-Time, Remote)



Platforms: Instagram, X, TikTok, Pinterest, LinkedIn

Schedule: Monday–Friday | 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST (New York Time)



About the Role



We are hiring full-time Social Media Marketing VA to manage and grow client social media accounts across Instagram, X, TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn.



This is a hands-on execution role, not a content-only or automation-based position.



All growth is done manually, using real engagement, strategic targeting, and platform-safe best practices.

No bots. No automation tools. No shortcuts.



Each analyst manages approximately 10 client accounts and is responsible for executing daily growth activities, tracking performance, and maintaining full visibility through documentation and reporting.



If you are detail-oriented, disciplined, and enjoy structured social media growth work, this role is a strong long-term fit.



Important Notes (Please Read Carefully)



No bots, automation tools, or third-party growth apps

All actions are manual and follow strict internal SOPs

Daily documentation, screenshots, and reporting are mandatory

This is a full-time role only (not freelance or part-time)



What You’ll Do



As a Social Media Marketing VA, you will:



Execute manual organic growth across assigned platforms

Follows / unfollows

Likes and comments

Story interactions, profile visits, community engagement

Follow client-approved growth strategies and daily limits

Manage and update daily tracking spreadsheets

Monitor account health, activity, and potential restrictions

Submit weekly summaries and performance updates

Collaborate with Account Manager and Content teams when needed



Job Requirements



To be considered, you must:



Be available full-time only (Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST)

Have reliable high-speed internet

Be comfortable with daily Slack communication 

Have a verified identity

Own both a computer and a mobile phone (required for account access)

Be willing to follow strict SOPs and documentation rules

Commit to long-term employment (not temporary work)



If you cannot work this schedule or follow structured processes, please do not apply.



Skills We’re Looking For



Strong written and spoken English

Familiarity with Instagram, X, TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn

Strong attention to detail and consistency

Ability to follow instructions precisely

Comfortable with repetitive but strategic execution

Prior social media or growth experience is a plus.

Professional, reliable, and accountable



Compensation & Benefits



Fixed monthly salary (paid via PayPal)

Full training and onboarding provided

Opportunities for advancement within the company



About the Team



We are a fully remote team with members across different countries, including the Philippines.

Some team members have been with us for 6+ years, and we value long-term collaboration, consistency, and accountability.



How to Apply



If you are interested in this position and meet all the requirements above, please search for Ampfluence (#1 Instagram Growth Service) and reach out via
 or our social media accounts.



Qualified candidates will be invited to a video interview.
